notes.usage: Load recipes (filter acquisition===craft) for the calculator. Resolve ingredient/output display via items[staticItemName] (or items[ingredientId]). Multi-output recipes set items[*].recipeIds for every Outputs entry and include recipes[].outputs with per-output counts (use that count when the tree targets a secondary product). ResourceInputs become ingredients with table "Resource" (e.g. Water). Resolve station labels via stations[id].displayName (Processing remaps RecipeSet→deployable when ids differ, e.g. Cleaning_Device→T3_Cleaning_Device). Use stations[id].craftRecipeId to craft the station. Walk trees with items[id].recipeIds; missing/empty recipeIds = raw; items with gatherFirst=true are world-gather primary (Ore/Wood/…) — treat as terminal even when recipeIds lists conversion recipes (Quarrite armor → ore, Pyritic crust, Frozen_Ore). First id is a reasonable default when multiple recipes share an output. Absent null/[] fields are defaults. Food Explore: recipes with instant Food/Water recovery (includes acquisition===gather for world edibles; acquisition===mission / mission:true for FactionMission.* items). Filter by items[*].foodAudience (or the same field on explore rows): animal = Item.AnimalFeed, prospector = Item.Consumable.Food*.
notes.tier0: Tier 0 means available without a Blueprint_T* unlock (default / Character crafting).
notes.stationDeduction: If a recipe has no Requirement, tier is the minimum tier among its RecipeSets stations.
notes.acquisition: 'craft' = normal recipe; 'gather' = world edible with Consumable but no craft/shop/workshop recipe; 'mission' = FactionMission-tagged edible with no craft recipe (often shares a display name with a craftable variant); 'shop' = bought in-world with currency (see purchase.shop); 'workshop' = orbital workshop item (see purchase.workshop). Purchase-only items have no tier/station. mission:true marks FactionMission.* items on any acquisition.
notes.foodAudience: items[*].foodAudience — 'animal' when Manual_Tags include Item.AnimalFeed (dedicated animal feed/gruel/silage); 'prospector' when tagged Item.Consumable.Food*. Omitted when neither applies. Animals can still eat many prospector foods; this marks design intent, not exclusive edibility.
notes.iconPath: Ready for `${gameAssetsUrl}/ItemIcons/${iconPath}.png`. Omitting iconPath means none / outside Item_Icons.
notes.review: meta.reviewQueueCount / flagSummary. Filter recipes whose flags intersect REVIEW_FLAGS for a review list.
notes.deployable: items[*].deployable / stations[*].deployable — pipe and power requirements for placeables (D_Resource + D_Processing + D_Generator). connections[].resource is electricity|water|biofuel|oxygen|crudeOil|refinedOil; required=false means optional (see optionalHint). powerDrawMw is processing draw when connected. generator covers internal fuel (biofuel/wood) without a pipe.

Acidic_Glands.description: A diseased specimen that can be cleaned to gain animal fat.  Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.

Advanced_Alteration_Bench.description: A bench with a 3d printer to create any attachment. Allows faster altering of items than the basic Alteration Bench.

Advanced_Aquarium.description: A very fancy fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.
Advanced_Aquarium.flavorText: I repeat, do NOT tap on the glass.

Advanced_Armor_Bench.description: Craft and assemble advanced protective items and garments.
Advanced_Armor_Bench.flavorText: With the ability to weave platinum into fiber and cure leather on a drying rack prospectors can craft tougher outfits for the harsh environment of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Arms.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Chest.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Feet.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Head.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Cloth_Legs.description: Light and breathable, designed for long journeys through the harsh sands of Icarus.

Advanced_Exotic_Delivery_Interface.description: An Orbital Exchange that is able to direct the exchange pods to an exact location.

Advanced_Fishing_Trap.description: An advanced trap that can catch all types of fish.

Advanced_Iron_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of iron, to attract more fish.
Advanced_Iron_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Advanced_Kitchen_Bench.flavorText: Cleaner and more durable than other benches on Icarus.

Advanced_Kitchen_Corner_Bench.description: Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.

Advanced_Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Advanced_Kitchen_Storage.description: The best cabinets this planet can offer.

Advanced_Leather.description: Treated leather for a more durable prospector protection solution.

Agave.description: A desert plant known for its hardy growth and sweet core.

Agave_Syrup.description: A natural sweetener extracted from Agave.
Agave_Syrup.flavorText: Liquid sunlight bottled for the weary.

AlienFossil_Conch.description: A decorated conch shell etched with strange markings.

AlienFossil_Pottery.description: An oddly-marked clay vessel, that has been damaged by something.

Alloy_Armor_Arms.description: Crafting through a process of combining metals to create a strong protective armor.

Alloy_Armor_Chest.description: Crafting through a process of combining metals to create a strong protective armor.

Alloy_Armor_Feet.description: Crafting through a process of combining metals to create a strong protective armor.

Alloy_Armor_Head.description: Crafting through a process of combining metals to create a strong protective armor.

Alloy_Armor_Legs.description: Crafting through a process of combining metals to create a strong protective armor.

AlphaWolf_Attachment_Melee.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Wound and Deep Wound on hit creatures.
AlphaWolf_Attachment_Melee.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Alpha_Sandworm_Statue_Bronze.description: A Sandworm in all its bronzed glory.
Alpha_Sandworm_Statue_Bronze.flavorText: It doesn\'t look too tough, at this size...

Alphawolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Alpha Wolf.
Alphawolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Alteration_Bench.description: A bench with built-in drill press for crafting attachments and a workspace for altering Items.

Aluminium.description: A lightweight and easily milled ingot of aluminium.
Aluminium.flavorText: \'I don\'t have aluminium foil on my windows any more.\' - Rick James

Aluminium_Arrow.description: A mid-grade, lightweight arrow giving decent range and damage.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Armor_Piercing.description: 5.56mm ammunition which can pierce the toughest surfaces

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Cold_Steel.description: A sturdy round crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Cold_Steel.flavorText: One of the few items that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Incendiary.description: 5.56mm ammunition which can ignite flammable targets.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Iron_Wood.description: A toxin-coated round, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Iron_Wood.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Lithium.description: A sturdy round crafted using Lithium, unique to Icarus.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Lithium.flavorText: One of the few items that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Obsidian.description: A lightweight round created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Obsidian.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Uranium.description: A sturdy round crafted using Uranium, unique to Icarus.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Uranium.flavorText: One of the few items that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Workshop_Bundle.description: A Box of 25 CHAC 5.56mm Ammo. \'CONSUME\' to open box.
Ammo_AssaultRifle_Round_Workshop_Bundle.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Ammo_Casing.description: A rough iron ammo casing that can be used to create all types of ammo.
Ammo_Casing.flavorText: Basic building blocks for firearm ammunition.

Ammo_Crude.description: A very basic ammo type that can only be used by low tier firearms.

Ammo_EDS.description: An Enzyme Delivery System - a hard outer case with Enzymes inside. Use with your favourite projectile-firing weapon - pistol, shotgun or rifle.
Ammo_EDS.flavorText: Rapid mutation results in increased creature danger for increased skinning rewards.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Armor_Piercing.description: 9mm ammunition which can pierce the toughest surfaces.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Cold_Steel.description: A sturdy round crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Ammo_Pistol_Round_Cold_Steel.flavorText: One of the few items that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Incendiary.description: 9mm ammunition which can ignite flammable targets.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Iron_Wood.description: A toxin-coated round, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Ammo_Pistol_Round_Iron_Wood.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Lithium.description: 9mm ammunition made with Lithium which can cause Electroshock.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Obsidian.description: A lightweight round created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Ammo_Pistol_Round_Obsidian.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Uranium.description: 9mm ammunition made with Uranium which can inflict Radiation Sickness.

Ammo_Pistol_Round_Workshop_Bundle.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Ammo_Rifle_Round_Workshop_Bundle.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Ammo_Shell_ColdSteel.description: This deadly shotgun ammunition is cast in Cold Steel, giving you an edge in the wilderness of Icarus.
Ammo_Shell_ColdSteel.flavorText: On Icarus, you need every advantage you can get.

Ammo_Shell_Ironwood.description: This deadly shotgun ammunition is coated in a Miasmic film, giving you an edge in the wilderness of Icarus.
Ammo_Shell_Ironwood.flavorText: On Icarus, you need every advantage you can get.

Ammo_Shell_Lithium.description: This deadly shotgun ammunition is cast in Lithium, giving you an edge in the wilderness of Icarus.
Ammo_Shell_Lithium.flavorText: On Icarus, you need every advantage you can get.

Ammo_Shell_Obsidian.description: This deadly shotgun ammunition is crafted from Obsidian, giving you an edge in the wilderness of Icarus.
Ammo_Shell_Obsidian.flavorText: On Icarus, you need every advantage you can get.

Ammo_Shell_Slug.flavorText: Now this thing can do some damage.

Ammo_Shell_Uranium.description: This deadly shotgun ammunition is cast in Uranium, giving you an edge in the wilderness of Icarus.
Ammo_Shell_Uranium.flavorText: On Icarus, you need every advantage you can get.

Ammo_Shell_Workshop_Bundle.description: A Box of 25 CHAC 12-Gauge Shells. \'CONSUME\' to open box.
Ammo_Shell_Workshop_Bundle.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Ammo_Sniper_Round_Explosive_Workshop_Bun.description: A Box of 25 CHAC 12.7mm Ammo. \'CONSUME\' to open box.
Ammo_Sniper_Round_Explosive_Workshop_Bun.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Ammo_Sniper_Round_Incendiary_Workshop_Bu.description: A Box of 25 CHAC 12.7mm Ammo. \'CONSUME\' to open box.
Ammo_Sniper_Round_Incendiary_Workshop_Bu.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

AnimalCarcass_BabyDeer.description: Far from Earth, further from help.
AnimalCarcass_BabyDeer.flavorText: Lightyears from Earth, the corpse of a baby deer somehow retains an echo of the tragic.

AnimalCarcass_BatDog.description: A hideous mutant now at peace.
AnimalCarcass_BatDog.flavorText: Though sympathy can\'t alter facts, it can help to make them more bearable. This creature deserves sympathy.

AnimalCarcass_Boar_Juvenile.description: A juvenile Boar which never quite made it to adulthood.

AnimalCarcass_Bounder_Desert.description: A Korrin once bounding along, now lies still.
AnimalCarcass_Bounder_Desert.flavorText: Another reminder that nothing survives Icarus forever.

AnimalCarcass_Chamois_M.description: A tough, fleet-footed variant of Earth\'s goat-antelope.
AnimalCarcass_Chamois_M.flavorText: Terraforming failed, leaving a wasteland at ground zero, into which Earth-like forests and their natural inhabitants spread rapidly and easily.

AnimalCarcass_Chamois_Var.description: Similar to a Chamois. This animal shows signs of subtle mutation.
AnimalCarcass_Chamois_Var.flavorText: Engineered from the Capra family of goats on Earth. Known to be less graceful than their Earth counterparts.

AnimalCarcass_Chew.description: The draven\'s form is broken on the ground, legs folded in unnatural stillness
AnimalCarcass_Chew.flavorText: Another reminder that nothing survives Icarus forever.

AnimalCarcass_Chick.description: A feathered friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Chick.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Chicken.description: A feathered friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Chicken.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Conifer_Wolf.flavorText: A genetic variant of the grey wolf, this efficient carnivore is an indiscriminate hunter, thriving in the transplanted forests of Icarus.

AnimalCarcass_Conifer_Wolf_Juvenile.description: A juvenile Wolf which never quite made it to adulthood.

AnimalCarcass_Deer.description: A genetically modified member of the cervid family.
AnimalCarcass_Deer.flavorText: Modification of their respiratory system allows these deer variants to withstand - and thrive - despite Icarus\'s toxic atmosphere. Resources can be harvested by hand, but a skinning bench yields greater resources.

AnimalCarcass_DeerDesert.description: Imported from Earth, adjusted and released to the reformed deserts of Icarus.
AnimalCarcass_DeerDesert.flavorText: \'A hunter who is going to shoot an antelope does not waste his bullets on the dog.\' - Israelmore Ayivor

AnimalCarcass_Deer_Variant.description: Muscular corpse of a deer-like creature.
AnimalCarcass_Deer_Variant.flavorText: Icarus is a microcosm of evolutionary extremes. Such pressures cause somewhat rapid and acute adaptation. The Equix for example, has twice the musculature at roughly twice the density compared to Earth cervidae.

AnimalCarcass_Desert_Wolf.flavorText: Ever adaptable, the hyena endures where little else survives.

AnimalCarcass_Jaguar.description: The second most dangerous thing in the forest
AnimalCarcass_Jaguar.flavorText: Introduced to manage the population of smaller mammals, the jaguar variant adopted swiftly to the arid regions of the new Icarus.

AnimalCarcass_Kea.flavorText: Once endangered on Earth, Icarus brings new life to this native bird.

AnimalCarcass_Komodo.flavorText: Probably safer than a live one.

AnimalCarcass_Lamb.description: A woolly friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Lamb.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Lava_Komodo.flavorText: Probably safer than a live one.

AnimalCarcass_Lion_F.description: The second most dangerous thing in the desert.
AnimalCarcass_Lion_F.flavorText: Introduced to manage the population of smaller mammals, the lion variant adopted swiftly to the arid regions of the new Icarus.

AnimalCarcass_Mange_Wolf.description: The corpse of a ferocious animal.
AnimalCarcass_Mange_Wolf.flavorText: What kind of nightmare did these escape from.

AnimalCarcass_Orka_Arctic.description: The carcass of a creature with far too many teeth.

AnimalCarcass_Pack_Wolf.flavorText: A hyper-aggressive member of a genetically-altered wolf pack

AnimalCarcass_Pig.description: Was once a little pig,  raised for the slaughter.

AnimalCarcass_Piglet.description: The remains of an animals, whose life was cut too short.

AnimalCarcass_PredatorBird.description: An endemic ambush predator torn from the skies.
AnimalCarcass_PredatorBird.flavorText: These intelligent flying reptiles are particular about their hunting opportunities. Often choosing targets that are weak or unaware. Mostly found scavenging an easy meal from a recent corpse.

AnimalCarcass_Pronghorn.description: A herd animal, able to endure the extremes of Icarus\'s environment.
AnimalCarcass_Pronghorn.flavorText: The pronghorn variant thrives on the sparse, desert terrain in which this region of Icarus now abounds.

AnimalCarcass_Rabbit.description: As on Earth, a survivor, but not today.
AnimalCarcass_Rabbit.flavorText: The rabbit variant has found a new niche on this malformed environment.

AnimalCarcass_Rabbit_Variant.description: As on Earth, a survivor, but not today.
AnimalCarcass_Rabbit_Variant.flavorText: The rabbit variant has found a new niche on this malformed environment.

AnimalCarcass_Rabbit_Variant_Snow.description: As on Earth, a survivor, but not today.
AnimalCarcass_Rabbit_Variant_Snow.flavorText: The rabbit variant has found a new niche on this malformed environment.

AnimalCarcass_Ram.description: A woolly friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Ram.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Roat_Lava.description: A dead specimen of local wildlife.
AnimalCarcass_Roat_Lava.flavorText: One of the rare endemic lifeforms able to survive in the failed terraforming zone, the roat endured the savage shift in Icarus\'s climate, due to its uniquely flexible respiratory system.

AnimalCarcass_Roat_Swamp.description: A dead specimen of local wildlife.
AnimalCarcass_Roat_Swamp.flavorText: One of the rare endemic lifeforms able to survive in the failed terraforming zone, the roat endured the savage shift in Icarus\'s climate, due to its uniquely flexible respiratory system.

AnimalCarcass_Rooster.description: A feathered friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Rooster.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Scorpion.description: One of the most dangerous creatures in the desert
AnimalCarcass_Scorpion.flavorText: This smooth plating could still be useful

AnimalCarcass_Sheep.description: A woolly friend lies at your feet, now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Sheep.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Slinker.description: This slinker\'s twisted frame lies motionless, its unnatural agility finally spent.
AnimalCarcass_Slinker.flavorText: Another reminder that nothing survives Icarus forever.

AnimalCarcass_SnowLeopard.description: An exotic, evasive predator of the ice.
AnimalCarcass_SnowLeopard.flavorText: "We nod, grimace, and resume our paths to separate destinies and graves." - Peter Matthiessen, The Snow Leopard

AnimalCarcass_Snow_Rabbit.description: As on Earth, a survivor, but not today.
AnimalCarcass_Snow_Rabbit.flavorText: As reproductively prodigious, even in the harshest environments of Icarus, as it was on earth.

AnimalCarcass_Snow_Wolf.flavorText: Ever adaptable, the snow wolf variant endures where little else survives.

AnimalCarcass_Snow_Wolf_Juvenile.description: A juvenile Snow Wolf which never quite made it to adulthood.

AnimalCarcass_Storca.description: The storca\'s thick hide and heavy frame suggest a creature built to endure.
AnimalCarcass_Storca.flavorText: Another reminder that nothing survives Icarus forever.

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_A.description: A furry friend lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_A.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_B.description: A furry friend lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_B.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_C.description: A furry friend lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Cat_C.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_A.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_A.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_B.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_B.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_C.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_C.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_C2.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_C2.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_D.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_D.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_E.description: A good dog lies at your feet now dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tame_Dog_E.flavorText: Frozen on Earth, Defrosted on Icarus, What a Life...

AnimalCarcass_Tundra_Deer.description: In death, this Drosik lays motionless.
AnimalCarcass_Tundra_Deer.flavorText: Another reminder that nothing survives Icarus forever.

AnimalCarcass_Tundra_Monkey.description: An annoying little creature now lies dead.
AnimalCarcass_Tundra_Monkey.flavorText: Did this thing throw a stick?

AnimalCarcass_Tundra_Monkey_Juvenile.description: A juvenile Gribbler which never quite made it to adulthood.

AnimalCarcass_WildBoar.description: The remains of one of nature\'s most feral creations.
AnimalCarcass_WildBoar.flavorText: Extraordinarily hardy and adaptable, this suid has become a wide-ranging pest in its short time on Icarus.

AnimalCarcass_WildBoar_Tame.description: The remains of one of nature\'s most feral creations.
AnimalCarcass_WildBoar_Tame.flavorText: Extraordinarily hardy and adaptable, this suid has become a wide-ranging pest in its short time on Icarus.

AnimalCarcass_Wooly_Zebra.description: A gregarious, migratory grazer and icon of the savannah.
AnimalCarcass_Wooly_Zebra.flavorText: The exact purpose of zebra stripes remains a mystery.

AnimalCarcass_Zebra.description: A gregarious, migratory grazer and icon of the savannah.
AnimalCarcass_Zebra.flavorText: The exact purpose of zebra stripes remains a mystery.

Animal_Bed.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot

Animal_Bed_Burlap.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Burlap.flavorText: Can\'t go wrong with a burlap sack

Animal_Bed_Emperor.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Emperor.flavorText: Treat your animal like the King or Queen they are.

Animal_Bed_Heated.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Heated.flavorText: Only the best of the best for your precious pet.

Animal_Bed_Leopard.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Leopard.flavorText: The spots make them run faster in their dreams.

Animal_Bed_Nesting.description: Can be used by animals to speed up the gestation process.
Animal_Bed_Nesting.flavorText: Nothing beats a soft fur bed.

Animal_Bed_Royal.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Royal.flavorText: Treat your animal like the King or Queen they are.

Animal_Bed_SnowLeopardSkin.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_SnowLeopardSkin.flavorText: Wow. You killed a rare animal to make a bed for your pet.

Animal_Bed_Striker.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Striker.flavorText: Hopefully this bed doesn\'t give your pet nightmares.

Animal_Bed_Tusker.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Tusker.flavorText: A rough but mostly comfortable bed.

Animal_Bed_WolfSkin.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot

Animal_Bed_Zebra.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Zebra.flavorText: Warning: Stripes may rub off onto your pet over time.

Animal_Bench.description: Specialised bench for crafting saddles, troughs, carts and various feeds.
Animal_Bench.flavorText: Your one stop show for all your animal needs.

Animal_Fat.description: The next best thing to butter.
Animal_Fat.flavorText: A key ingredient in energy dense cooking, life on any world would be almost unliveable without some kind of lipid.

Animal_Gruel_Fish.description: Will satisfy an animals hunger, but not their taste buds.

Animal_Gruel_Fruit.description: Will satisfy an animals hunger, but not their taste buds.

Animal_Gruel_Meat.description: Will satisfy an animals hunger, but not their taste buds.

Animal_Gruel_Rotten.description: The bare minimum in terms of nutrition.

Animal_Gruel_Vegetable.description: Will satisfy an animals hunger, but not their taste buds.

Animal_Silage.description: Long-life, fermented animal feed. Simple but Convenient.

AntiRadiation_Injection.description: Instantly removes a large amount of Radiation Exposure.

AntiRadiation_Tonic.description: Slowly Cleans Irradiated Blood and Stimulates The Repair of Cells

AntiRadiation_Transfusion.description: Slowly Cleans Irradiated Blood and Stimulates The Repair of Cells.

Antibiotic_Paste.description: Reduces the duration of food poisoning, and other low grade infections.
Antibiotic_Paste.flavorText: A natural antibacterial agent that diminishes the impact of afflictions such as infected wounds and cave sickness.

Antibiotic_Pill.description: A broad-spectrum antibacterial agent, protecting against food poisoning, wound infections and cave sickness.
Antibiotic_Pill.flavorText: While not quite invincible, your susceptibility to microbial takeover will temporarily reach an all-time low.

Antibiotic_Tonic.description: An antibacterial distillation that cures food poisoning, wound infections and afflictions like cave sickness.
Antibiotic_Tonic.flavorText: The interaction between bioactive substances and microbial life here on Icarus is still poorly understood, especially when one factors in the effects of exotic matter to both.

Antiparasitic_Paste.description: A medical preparation for reducing the duration of festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Antiparasitic_Paste.flavorText: From the very first, newcomers to Icarus noted the medicinal and bioactive properties of Earth-type plants were significantly more intense.

Antiparasitic_Pill.description: A potent antibacterial preparation for preventing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Antiparasitic_Pill.flavorText: Flooding your body with antibiotics is a double-edged sword, but if it stops you needing to use the word \'festering\' to describe part of your body, it\'s worth it.

Antiparasitic_Tonic.description: A medicinal preparation for curing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Antiparasitic_Tonic.flavorText: From suppurating wounds to dysentery, this natural broad-spectrum antibiotic remedy cures it all.

Antipoison_Paste.description: A basic toxicology and anti-venom kit to reduce the duration of poisoning.
Antipoison_Paste.flavorText: It\'s speculated that exotics may suffuse much of the plant life in the terrazone, imparting bioactive properties, though exactly what these are, whether they\'re safe, and exactly how it works ... at this stage, who knows?

Antipoison_Pill.description: An long-acting anti-venom to prevent poisoning.

Anvil_Bench.description: Heavyweight work surface for iron and steel tools, using ingots smelted in their appropriate furnaces.
Anvil_Bench.flavorText: Arguably the simplest fabrication system known to humanity.

Anvil_Bench_T3.description: A versatile forge powered by coal for crafting various weapons and tools.
Anvil_Bench_T3.flavorText: Try to keep all digits away from the anvil...

Anvil_Bench_T4_v2.description: An impressive foundry powered by electricity for crafting various higher quality weapons and tools.
Anvil_Bench_T4_v2.flavorText: The UDA states that it has been at least seven days since the last accident using this piece of equipment...

Any_Water_Container.description: Water containers come in a variety of shapes and sizes.
Any_Water_Container.flavorText: Can be used to fill with various drinks.

Ape_Armor_Arms.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Arms.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Chest.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Chest.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Feet.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Feet.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Head.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Head.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Legs.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Legs.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Attachment.description: An attachment which increases melee damage and has a blunt force trauma chance.
Ape_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ape_Attractor.description: A device which when powered will draw creatures to its location. Less effective if there are other attractors present already.
Ape_Attractor.flavorText: The opposite of a Creature Deterrent.

Ape_Bicep.description: A piece of tendon taken from the body of a great beast.

Ape_Fishing_Trap.description: A fishing trap crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Fishing_Trap.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Ape_Grenade.description: A high-tech sonic grenade which causes creatures to become frenzied and attack each other.
Ape_Grenade.flavorText: A grenade crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.

Ape_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Ape_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ape_Hide.description: A piece of hide taken from the body of a great beast.

Ape_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Garganutan creature.

Ape_Rug.description: A rug crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Rug.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Ape_Tonic.description: A tonic that sends one into a frenzy ready to engage in fist to fist combat.

Ape_Trophy.description: A preserved specimen from a Garganutan that once lived on Icarus.
Ape_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Aquarium.description: A handy fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, powered by biofuel.

ArcticArmor_Arms.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.

ArcticArmor_Chest.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.

ArcticArmor_Feet.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.

ArcticArmor_Head.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.

ArcticArmor_Legs.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.

Arctic_Bat_Head.description: What remains of a mutated bat-like creature.
Arctic_Bat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Arctic_Bat_Trophy.description: A Trophy of a mutated bat like creature.
Arctic_Bat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Arctic_Rabbit_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Arctic_Scorpion_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Arctic Scorpion.
Arctic_Scorpion_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Arctic_Scorpion_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Armor_Attachment_Comfort_1.description: An attachment that increases comfort level on armor.
Armor_Attachment_Comfort_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Armor_Attachment_Comfort_2.description: An attachment that increases comfort level on armor.
Armor_Attachment_Comfort_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Armor_Bench.description: Craft and assemble various protective items and garments.
Armor_Bench.flavorText: Basic fabric, leatherwork and armorer\'s tools allow you to fashion a range of clothing and protective wear from natural materials and fibers.

Armour_Stand.description: A nicely carved stand where armor can be displayed.
Armour_Stand.flavorText: Show off your armor or use it to quickly equip, up to you prospector.

Arms_Attachment_FistDamage_1.description: An attachment that increases damage from fist attacks.
Arms_Attachment_FistDamage_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_FistDamage_2.description: An attachment that increases damage from fist attacks.
Arms_Attachment_FistDamage_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_ThrowAccuracy_1.description: An attachment that increases accuracy of thrown projectiles.
Arms_Attachment_ThrowAccuracy_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_ThrowAccuracy_2.description: An attachment that increases accuracy of thrown projectiles.
Arms_Attachment_ThrowAccuracy_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_1.description: An attachment that reduces the stamina used for tool actions and the durability loss of tools.
Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the stamina used for tool actions and the durability loss of tools.
Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ashen_Drake_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ashen Drake.
Ashen_Drake_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ashen_Drake_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Avocado.description: A fruit with a creamy texture and nutty flavor, high in healthy fats.
Avocado.flavorText: These are commonly used in Mexican cuisine.

Axe_Attachment_FellingDamage_1.description: An attachment that increases damage to felling trees, cutting them down in less strikes.
Axe_Attachment_FellingDamage_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Tool at an Alteration Bench.

Axe_Attachment_FellingDamage_2.description: An attachment that increases damage to felling trees, cutting them down in less strikes.
Axe_Attachment_FellingDamage_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Tool at an Alteration Bench.

Axe_Attachment_Felling_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of wood from felling trees.
Axe_Attachment_Felling_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Axe at an Alteration Bench.

Axe_Attachment_Felling_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of wood from felling trees.
Axe_Attachment_Felling_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Axe at an Alteration Bench.

Bacon_Sandwich.flavorText: Bacon in Bread, whats not to love.

Banana_Bread.description: Banana bread which should only be consumed in the workplace.
Banana_Bread.flavorText: Good things come to those who wait.

Banana_Porridge.description: A hot, starchy meal made by simmering banana into a thick, sustaining mash.

Banana_Tart.description: A baked pastry filled with sweetened banana, offering a rare taste of comfort.
Banana_Tart.flavorText: Almost makes you forget where you are - almost.

Banana_Toast.description: Some diced up banana placed gently on some lightly toasted bread.

Bandage_Basic.description: Cloth bandages to stem bleeding and heal minor wounds.
Bandage_Basic.flavorText: The healing won\'t start until the bleeding stops.

Bandage_Cooling.description: A bandage with a soothing balm to quickly lower temperatures. Treats heatstroke and heat exhaustion.

Bandage_Heat.description: Cloth bandages impregnated with a warming salve, for treating frosty and frostbite.

Bark_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from bark, to attract more fish.
Bark_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Basic_Backpack.description: A tough leather backpack that increases inventory space, carry weight capacity and reduces the weight of ore.
Basic_Backpack.flavorText: Sol Berlinski, now Lagos Unit dispatcher on Ceres Station, claims the design of the \'quietly iconic\' prospector\'s basic backpack was taught to him personally by Mo Chou.

Basic_Ceiling_Light.description: A bunker-style lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.
Basic_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: "We forgive children who are afraid of the dark. The tragedy is adults afraid of the light." - Plato

Basic_Fertilizer.description: Provides a small bonus to growth speed and crop yield
Basic_Fertilizer.flavorText: A simple way to increase your harvest

Basic_Fishing_Trap.description: A simple trap that can catch Basic Low Quality Fish

Basic_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A simple device for processing oxite into oxygen.
Basic_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: The oxidizer is a slow, unpowered device that uses mechanical pressure to crush oxite, then store the resulting oxygen. Once the balloon begins to fill, consume oxygen from it directly.

Basic_Quiver.description: Dedicated arrow storage, allowing faster reloading, swifter aiming and higher arrow speeds.

Battery_Lantern.description: A robust, portable battery-powered lamp. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

Battery_Shelf_T3.description: A rack of batteries that can supply power to your network.

Battery_Shelf_T4.description: A rack of high-capacity batteries that can supply power to your network.

Bauxite.description: Sedimentary bauxite with a high aluminium content.

Beacon_Tool.description: A tool to drop beacons to assist you in your exploration of Icarus.

Bean.description: Close to the perfect food source.
Bean.flavorText: The argument over whether soy produces \'milk\' or \'juice\' rages into the 22nd century.

Bear_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Bear.
Bear_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Bear_Trophy.flavorText: Until you step beyond the terrazone, few totems of survival speak louder than a grizzly\'s silent head.

Bed_Bedroll.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
Bed_Bedroll.flavorText: \'A bed is where the soul returns after a night\'s travelling\' ~ Russian folk saying

Bed_Interior_Wood.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.
Bed_Interior_Wood.flavorText: A solidly made, simple place to rest and restore energy

Beehive.description: A beehive that can be used to start your beekeeping journey.
Beehive.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_BreedingCenter.description: A Breeding Center that attaches to a beehive that provides the facilities for a Queen Bee to produce Worker Bees.
Beehive_BreedingCenter.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_Expansion.description: An expansion for your beehive that will increase its inventory space.
Beehive_Expansion.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_Expansion2.description: An expansion for your beehive that will increase its inventory space even further.
Beehive_Expansion2.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beehive_Extractor.description: An extractor that attaches to a beehive that can process Honeycomb into Honey and Beeswax.
Beehive_Extractor.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Beer.description: Proving you can brew beer from just about anything.
Beer.flavorText: Warms the body, soothes the soul, increases regeneration rates.

Beeswax.description: Freshly processed Beeswax, ready for use.
Beeswax.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Berry.description: Berries will satisfy hunger, hydrate slightly, and extend endurance, but not for long.
Berry.flavorText: The intrepid prospector may also ferment wine, trusting that the quality of the resulting beverage is less important than the sheer fact of its existence.

Big_Breakfast.description: Fried meat, eggs, tomatoes and potatoes!
Big_Breakfast.flavorText: You can never go wrong with a big breakfast...

Biofuel_Can_Meta.description: A makeshift fuel canister, that can hold biofuel, comes prefilled.
Biofuel_Can_Meta.flavorText: The caps a bit loose, still sealed, but that\'s fine right?

Biofuel_Water_Pump.description: A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.

Biomass.description: A biomass carefully extracted from a Legendary Creature. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Biomass.flavorText: The scientists at the Bio-Lab would be interested in this...

Black_Fur.description: A patch of fur taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Black_Wolf_Arms.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Arms.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Arrow.description: An arrow made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Black_Wolf_Chest.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Chest.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Feet.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Feet.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Head.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Head.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Knife.description: A knife made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Black_Wolf_Legs.description: A piece of specialty armor perfect for hunting in the forests of Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Legs.flavorText: Wearing this item may result in a severe urge to howl at the moon.

Black_Wolf_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of the remains of a Black Wolf.
Black_Wolf_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Black_Wolf_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Black Wolf Creature.

Black_Wolf_Shield.description: An impressive shield crafted from the spoils of defeating a Black Wolf
Black_Wolf_Shield.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

Black_Wolf_Throwing_Knife.description: A knife made from the teeth of an intimidating predator.

Black_Wolf_Tooth.description: A razor sharp canine pulled from the mouth of a beast.
Black_Wolf_Tooth.flavorText: Handle with care, or lose a finger.

Black_Wolf_Trap.description: A trap that snap\'s shut to damage creatures that walk within range.

Black_Wolf_Trophy.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Black_Wolf_Trophy_Howl.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy_Howl.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Black_Wolf_Trophy_Sit.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy_Sit.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Blood_Thinning_Paste.description: A folk remedy for diminishing the effects of concussions and contusions.

Blood_Thinning_Pill.description: A potent preventative for concussions and contusions.
Blood_Thinning_Pill.flavorText: Off-label and off-planet, this one doesn\'t come with any warnings. So it\'s probably safe.

Blood_Thinning_Tonic.description: An effective remedy for relieving concussions and contusions.
Blood_Thinning_Tonic.flavorText: Voyagers to Icarus have found themselves forced to ressurect a range of folk treatments and traditional medicines.

Blue_Reed_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted from flowers, to attract more fish.
Blue_Reed_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Blueback_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Blueback.
Blueback_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Blueback_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Body_Attachment_Stomach_Capacity.description: An attachment that allows an extra active food buff and increases the duration of food buffs.
Body_Attachment_Stomach_Capacity.flavorText: Can be equipped to Chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Head_Attachment_Quick_Healing.description: An attachment that improves the recovery speed of all afflictions.
Body_Head_Attachment_Quick_Healing.flavorText: Can be equipped to head or chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.description: An attachment that increases carrying capacity and inventory slots.
Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, hands or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.description: An attachment that greatly increases carrying capacity and inventory slots.
Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, hands or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that improves health regeneration and physical resistance.
Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves health regeneration and physical resistance.
Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Bone.description: Useful for crafting basic tools and weapons.
Bone.flavorText: One of the oldest crafting materials known to humanity, available on Icarus thanks to the last-minute genetic redesigns of Earth-native animals, which now thrive in the terrazone.

Bone_Arms.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Arms.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Arrow.description: A primitive arrow, dealing greater damage than stone.
Bone_Arrow.flavorText: In the mid-22nd century, the fletchers art is being rediscovered on Icarus.

Bone_Chest.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Chest.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Feet.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Feet.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Head.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Head.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Knife.description: Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin.
Bone_Knife.flavorText: Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?

Bone_Legs.description: A fearsome piece of armor that is created from your previous foes.
Bone_Legs.flavorText: Strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.

Bone_Lure.description: A lightweight lure carefully crafted out of bone, to attract more fish.
Bone_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Bone_Sickle.flavorText: The falk or grasshook is a harvesting tool of old, a symbol of labor, and weapon of disgruntled serfdom.

Bone_Spear.description: A bone blade improves melee damage.
Bone_Spear.flavorText: As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.

Bone_Throwing_Knife.description: Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin.
Bone_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?

Bone_Throwing_Spear.description: A bone blade improves ranged damage.
Bone_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.

Bounder_Head.description: A preserved memory of a gentle animal.
Bounder_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Bounder_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Korrin.
Bounder_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Bramble.description: Can be deployed, but not picked up
Bramble.flavorText: Will hurt you if you get too close

Brazier.description: An easily crafted, open source of light.

Brick_Sign_Small.description: A clay brick sign to display information.

BrownBear_Armor_Head.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Arms.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Chest.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Feet.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brownbear_Legs.description: This homemade armor provides an increase to melee fighting skills.

Brutalist_Bed.description: A robust bed crafted from a base of coarse concrete embodying the raw, minimalist essence of brutalist design.
Brutalist_Bed.flavorText: Brutalist furniture design originated in the mid-20th century on Earth and is characterized by its use of raw materials, geometric forms, and a focus on function over ornamentation.

Buffalo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Buffalo.
Buffalo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Buffalo_Statue_Stone.description: A stone monument praising the mighty Buffalo.
Buffalo_Statue_Stone.flavorText: You need to be BUFF to carry this.

Buffalo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Building_RepairTool.description: Maintain or upgrade your structures against the wrath of Icarus.
Building_RepairTool.flavorText: Quickly beat dislodged planks back into place, or replace those planks with sturdier materials, a single hammer does it all!

Bulky_Armor_Arms.description: Uses advanced medical technology to provide chemicals directly into the bloodstream to promote recovery.
Bulky_Armor_Arms.flavorText: At some point you become more machine than man.

Bulky_Armor_Chest.description: Uses advanced medical technology to provide chemicals directly into the bloodstream to promote recovery.
Bulky_Armor_Chest.flavorText: At some point you become more machine than man.

Bulky_Armor_Feet.description: Uses advanced medical technology to provide chemicals directly into the bloodstream to promote recovery.
Bulky_Armor_Feet.flavorText: At some point you become more machine than man.

Bulky_Armor_Head.description: Uses advanced medical technology to provide chemicals directly into the bloodstream to promote recovery.
Bulky_Armor_Head.flavorText: At some point you become more machine than man.

Bulky_Armor_Legs.description: Uses advanced medical technology to provide chemicals directly into the bloodstream to promote recovery.
Bulky_Armor_Legs.flavorText: At some point you become more machine than man.

Bull_Head.description: The remains of a mighty bull.
Bull_Head.flavorText: Even in death it is majestic.

Bull_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Butcher_Knife.description: A knife designed to kill animal companions and mounts quickly.

Butchery_Bench.description: A modular workspace for working with all kinds of meat products.
Butchery_Bench.flavorText: Be careful, the knives are sharp.

Calf_Head.description: What is left of a small friend.
Calf_Head.flavorText: Never had the chance to grow up.

Calf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Campfire.description: A place to cook food and fend the cold away.
Campfire.flavorText: One of the simplest sources of heat available on Icarus, the campfire burns sticks and wood to cook basic foods. Toxins in the planet\'s atmosphere do not interfere with combustion.

Caramel_Fruit_Tart.description: A scrumptious caramel tart, with berries for added flavour.

Caramelized_Onions.description: Slow-cooked onions with rich, sweet flavour.
Caramelized_Onions.flavorText: Time and patience make for pure gold.

Carbon_Arms.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Arms.flavorText: Focused on energy absorbance rather than outright hardness, the material\'s graphene multi-layered construction bleeds impact energy away almost instantly.

Carbon_Arrow.description: Strength and lightness combined in one hard-hitting package.

Carbon_Chest.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Chest.flavorText: Two hundred times stronger than steel and extraordinarily conductive, the IO suit\'s graphene weave allows it to dissipate energy with near-perfect efficiency.

Carbon_Feet.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Feet.flavorText: Norex is a \'grey\' research venture between \'old world\' ACS companies Norsec and mining giant ExMin.

Carbon_Fiber.description: A lightweight, flexible construction material with high tensile strength.

Carbon_Head.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Head.flavorText: A high-tech balance of physical protection, lightweight nano-construction, energy absorbance and protection against extremes of temperature.

Carbon_Legs.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Legs.flavorText: A product of zero-g manufacturing techniques, this semi-rigid mid-weight graphene protextile is renowned for protecting against micro-meteorites travelling at upward of 10km/sec.

Carbon_Paste.description: A carbon-based admixture used in advanced constructions.

Carbon_Spear.description: A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.

Carbon_Throwing_Spear.description: A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.

Carpentry_Bench.description: Workbench and tools for advanced wooden crafting.
Carpentry_Bench.flavorText: The rapid growth of trees on Icarus makes for noticeably less durable wooden creations.

Carpentry_Bench_T4.description: Powered workbench and machine tools for advanced woodworking.

Carrot.description: A carrot, like many before it.

Carrot_Cake.description: A big carrot cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.
Carrot_Cake.flavorText: Who knew vegetables could taste this great.

Carrot_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of carrot cake, made from scratch on Icarus.
Carrot_Cake_Piece.flavorText: Who knew vegetables could taste this great.

Carved_Bed.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Bookshelf.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Chair_Living_2Seater.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.
