Carved_Wardrobe.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Cat_Bowl_Food.description: A simple bowl to fill with food for your cat.

Cat_Bowl_Water.description: A simple bowl to fill with water for your cat.
Cat_Bowl_Water.flavorText: A hydrated pet is a happy pet.

Cat_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Head_A3.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A3.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Trophy_A1.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

Cat_Trophy_A2.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

Cat_Trophy_A3.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

CaveLight.description: Provides a temporary light for cave exploration for marking a path. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

CaveSpotLight.description: Provides a strong temporary light for keeping things lit at night. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

CavewormScale_Arms.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Chest.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Feet.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Head.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Legs.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

Caveworm_Arrow.flavorText: While the worms\' existence inside the terrazone is a mystery, their scales make extraordinarily practical blades

Caveworm_Bow.description: A hard-won trophy turned into a weapon
Caveworm_Bow.flavorText: Still smells a little strange though

Caveworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Caveworm.
Caveworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Caveworm_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the worm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Caveworm_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Caveworm_Spear.flavorText: Many factions continue to research these worms, suspecting that subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Caveworm_Statue_Stone.description: A stone carving of a caveworm, minus the poison spit.

Caveworm_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the worm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Caveworm_Throwing_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Caveworm_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Many factions continue to research these worms, suspecting that subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Caveworm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Cement_Mixer.flavorText: Concrete is composed of two essential elements: aggregate and a cement binder, with ratios depending on the specific design mix. Specialized concrete engineers are rare on Icarus, though.

Chainsaw.description: A rugged chainsaw designed for sustained use in extreme temperatures and rough terrain.

Chainsaw_Sawblade.description: Sawblades for the Timber Extraction Unit.

Chala_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Chala.
Chala_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chala_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chamios_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Chamois.
Chamios_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chamios_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Charcoal.flavorText: Slightly lower oxygen levels result in burned carbon forming charcoal naturally.

Charging_Device.description: Charges basic battery powered devices when they are placed inside.

Charging_Device_Wall.description: Charges basic battery powered devices when they are placed on top. Wall mounted and snaps to other wall chargers for easy placement.

Checkered_Flag.description: A Flag Pole with flag, made to withstand harsh conditions.

Cheese.description: A chunk of cheese, made on Icarus with Soybean as a rennet.
Cheese.flavorText: One of the best human inventions.

Cheese_Pizza.description: The most basic form of pizza that exists.
Cheese_Pizza.flavorText: One of the best culinary inventions.

Cheese_Roll.flavorText: A classic orginating from the South Island of New Zealand.

Chefs_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your cooking needs.

Chemistry_Bench.flavorText: Unlikely to win anyone a Nobel Prize, but sufficient for the average Icarus alchemist.

Chest_Attachment_Oxygen_1.description: An attachment that decreases Oxygen consumption.
Chest_Attachment_Oxygen_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Chest armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Chest_Attachment_Oxygen_2.description: An attachment that decreases Oxygen consumption.
Chest_Attachment_Oxygen_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Chest armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Chest_Attachment_StomachCapacity_2.description: An attachment that allows an extra active food buff and increases the duration of food buffs.
Chest_Attachment_StomachCapacity_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to Chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Chew_Head.description: A preserved memory of a mighty camel.
Chew_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chew_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Draven.
Chew_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chick_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chick_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chicken_Coop.description: A place that chickens can go to feel safe, and lay eggs.
Chicken_Coop.flavorText: Built by your own hand, and it feels good.

Chicken_Coop_Red.description: A state of the art coop that chickens can go to feel safe, and lay eggs.
Chicken_Coop_Red.flavorText: Why do chickens have a better house than you?

Chicken_Head.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chicken_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chicken_Head_A3.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head_A3.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chocolate_Cake.description: A big chocolate cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.
Chocolate_Cake.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Chocolate_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of chocolate cake, made from scratch on Icarus.
Chocolate_Cake_Piece.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Clay.description: A mouldable, fine-grained material that can be baked into bricks.
Clay.flavorText: Also a popular medium for artists.

ClayBrick_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

ClayBrick_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

ClayBrick_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

ClayBrick_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

ClayBrick_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

ClayBrick_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Clay_Brick.description: A solid and reliable tool for building strong structures.

Clay_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Clay_Brick_Beam.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Door.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Floor.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A homely half-piece for your walls.
Clay_Brick_Halfpiece.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Railing.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Railing_Gate.description: A sturdy elegant looking Railing Gate.
Clay_Brick_Railing_Gate.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Clay_Brick_Ramp.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Roof_Corner.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Roof_Half_Pitch.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_TrapDoor.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Clay_Brick_Wall.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Wall_Angle.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Window.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Cloth_Arms.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Chest.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Feet.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Head.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Legs.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Coal_Ore.description: A readily combustible, energy dense ore.
Coal_Ore.flavorText: Composed of ancient carbon-based plant matter, the combination of exotics and Icarus\'s tumultuous geophysics forms coal much faster than on Earth.

Coconut_Cake.description: A big coconut cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.

Coconut_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of coconut cake, made from scratch on Icarus.

Coconut_Cookie.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Coconut_mature.description: Maturity diminishes liquid content, but offers more satisfying flesh.
Coconut_mature.flavorText: A coconut\'s final stage is also its most energy-rich.

Coconut_mid.description: A balance of light sustenance and moderate hydration, in a fibrous shell.
Coconut_mid.flavorText: Ripe coconuts contain a balance of thirst-quenching liquid and energy-dense, hunger satisfying flesh.

Coconut_young.description: Mostly water, young coconuts will quench thirst but won\'t do much for hunger.
Coconut_young.flavorText: Like sharks, coconuts often fail to live up to their lethal reputation.

Coffee.flavorText: Humanity was never going to last long in Icarus without it.

Cold_Steel_Arrow.description: A sturdy Arrow crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Arrow.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Axe.description: A sturdy Axe crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Wood collected with this Axe will burn for longer.
Cold_Steel_Axe.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Bolt.description: A sturdy Bolt crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Bolt.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Ingot.description: Formed by melding a Steel Ingot with Super Cooled Ice.
Cold_Steel_Ingot.flavorText: Do not allow direct contact with skin.

Cold_Steel_Knife.description: A sturdy Knife crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Meat harvested with this knife will take more time to spoil.
Cold_Steel_Knife.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Pickaxe.description: A sturdy Pickaxe crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Gives a chance to collect Frozen Ore on impact.
Cold_Steel_Pickaxe.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Sickle.description: A sturdy Sickle crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Plants harvested with this sickle will take more time to spoil.
Cold_Steel_Sickle.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Sledgehammer.description: A sturdy Hammer crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Gives a chance to collect Frozen Ore on impact.
Cold_Steel_Sledgehammer.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Spear.description: A sturdy Spear crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Spear.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Throwing_Knife.description: A sturdy Throwing Knife crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Throwing_Spear.description: An aerodynamic spear crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Combat_Knife.description: A hardened sheepsfoot blade for the swiftest killing and skinning.

Composite_Arms.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Arms.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Arrow.description: For power and weight, nothing compares.

Composite_Chest.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Chest.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Feet.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Feet.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Head.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Head.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Legs.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Legs.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Sign_Small.description: A composite sign to display information.

Composite_Spear.description: Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.
Composite_Spear.flavorText: Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.

Composite_Throwing_Spear.description: Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.
Composite_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.

Composites.description: An extremely strong, light and endurant construction material.

Composter.description: Rapidly decomposes organic matter into biofuel, which is collected by adding a biofuel can. Can be connected to a water network for increased processing speed.
Composter.flavorText: Requires a fuel can to be added to collect biofuel.

Composter_Electric.description: Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.
Composter_Electric.flavorText: An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.

Composter_Wood.description: Change your trash into Fertilizer with this simple composter. Items placed in this device will spoil at an accelerated rate.

Compounds.description: Reactive fluids and reagents for use in adhesives, solvents and acids.

Concrete_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Concrete_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for extremely high building.
Concrete_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height even further.

Concrete_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

Concrete_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

Concrete_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

Concrete_Floor.description: Strong and stable, a floor that endures the worst Icarus can deliver.

Concrete_Frame.description: The strongest, most stable foundation for any structure.

Concrete_Furnace_V2.description: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
Concrete_Furnace_V2.flavorText: Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

Concrete_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Concrete_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Concrete_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Concrete_Mix.description: A rudimentary, but serviceable concrete analogue.
Concrete_Mix.flavorText: Invented almost 8000 years ago, the composition of concrete has always varied depending on available resources and needs. Never was this more true than on Icarus.

Concrete_Ramp.description: A high strength slope, supports great weight.

Concrete_Roof_Corner.description: A collection of Steel Roofing pieces.

Concrete_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

Concrete_TrapDoor.flavorText: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

Concrete_Wall_Angle.description: Moulded inserts for gables and other angular constructions.

Concrete_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Concrete_Window.description: A heavy duty, highly durable window.

Condensed_Enzymes.description: Condensed Enzymes Extracted from an Enzyme Geyser
Condensed_Enzymes.flavorText: I\'m sure there is a use for this.

Condensed_Exotic.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Requires Lasers to be Cut into smaller useable pieces.
Condensed_Exotic.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

ConiferWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Wolf.
ConiferWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

ConiferWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Cooked_Agave.description: Roasted to release subtle sweetness and energy.
Cooked_Agave.flavorText: Roasting teases out a caramel heart.

Cooked_Bacon.description: A delicately thin slice of meat

Cooked_Banana.description: A banana cooked over open heat, concentrating its sugars into a warm, filling snack.

Cooked_Carrot.flavorText: Boosts stamina slightly, may prompt angst.

Cooked_Corn.description: Grilled to perfection, depending on your standards.
Cooked_Corn.flavorText: A source of fuel for humans, animals and machines alike.

Cooked_Eggs.description: A fresh egg fried just right.

Cooked_Garlic.description: Roasted cloves with a rich, mellow taste.

Cooked_Kumara.description: This meal has a caramelized exterior and soft and fluffy interior.
Cooked_Kumara.flavorText: Tastier than a staple food but just as easy.

Cooked_Meat.description: Can be eaten to satisfy hunger.
Cooked_Meat.flavorText: Cooked meat is easier to digest and provides more nutrition than raw flesh.

Cooked_Mushroom.flavorText: Mushrooms are notably the only lifeform introduced from Earth that required no genetic adjustment whatsoever.

Cooked_Onion.description: Softened and sweetened, perfect for simple meals.

Cooked_Potato.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Cooked_PricklyPear.description: Softened cactus fruit with a mellow sweetness.
Cooked_PricklyPear.flavorText: Sweetness wrestled from a thorny shell.

Cooked_Pumpkin.flavorText: The pumpkins natural beta-carotene improves endurance.

Cooked_Rhubarb.description: This snack is lightly cooked in a pan with sugar or honey

Cooked_Squash.description: Like roast pumpkin, boasting a similar flavor and most of the same effects.
Cooked_Squash.flavorText: Boosts stamina, if not the will to live.

Cooked_Tomato.description: A hearty vegetable that improves health regeneration.

Cooked_Truffle.description: Cooked to enhance its earthy, luxurious flavour.
Cooked_Truffle.flavorText: Earthy notes that whisper of rare indulgence on this side of the system.

Cooking_Station_V2.description: A food preparation and butchering bench.
Cooking_Station_V2.flavorText: While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.

Cooler_Large.description: A powered heat exchange unit for cooling larger areas.

Copper_Bolt.description: Lightweight and strong, the copper bolt hits hard over distance.

Copper_Ore.description: Low grade copper ore, can be refined into pure ingots.
Copper_Ore.flavorText: The abundance of raw, high-quality metals on Icarus would have made it a goldmine, were it not so far removed from Earth.

Copper_Wire.description: This wire can be used in Electrical Circuits

Corn.flavorText: Cook or cultivate this ancient cereal, humanity\'s most widely produced grain.

Cougar_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Cougar.
Cougar_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cow_Head.description: What is left of a large friend.

Cow_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Crafting_Bench.description: A sturdy construction bench, though useless without shelter.
Crafting_Bench.flavorText: A heavy woodworking table that enables construction of improved tools, weapons and structural elements.

Cream.description: Fresh cream, cannot be eaten on its own.

CreatureBait_Boar.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Boars. Only effective in Forest or Grassland biomes.

CreatureBait_Hyena.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Hyenas. Only effective in Desert or Volcanic biomes.

CreatureBait_Orka.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Skulks. Only effective in Tundra or Arctic biomes.

CreatureBait_Storca.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Storca. Only effective in Tundra or Arctic biomes.

CreatureBait_Tundra_Monkey.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Gribblers. Only effective in Tundra biomes.

CreatureBait_Wolf.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Wolves. Only effective in Forest, Grassland, or Arctic biomes.

Crocodile_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Crocodile.
Crocodile_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Crocodile_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Crossbow.description: Heavy hitting with a slow reload, so make it count.
Crossbow.flavorText: \'The first time I held a crossbow, I was confused. How can you feel powerful and so medieval at the same time?\' -- Anton Chang

Crude_Oil_Refiner.description: A high-heat refinery that breaks down crude oil into cleaner, machine-ready output.
Crude_Oil_Refiner.flavorText: Tames the dirtiest fuel this planet can offer.

Crumbed_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A crispy and savory dish made by coating tender fillets of fish in breadcrumbs and frying until golden brown.
Crumbed_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Crispy on the outside, fishy on the inside.

Crushed_Bone.flavorText: Highly ground bone creates a useful ingredient for a range of concoctions.

Crushed_Limestone.description: Limestone that has been crushed, ready for use.
Crushed_Limestone.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Cured_Leather_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of leather, to attract more fish.
Cured_Leather_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

DebugViking.description: Meat from a recently killed animal, worth cooking first.
DebugViking.flavorText: Transplanted from Earth, a range of genetically modified animals thrive in the terrazone, providing an energy-dense food source.

Deep_Freeze.description: A freezer that preserves food but amasses ice very slowly and uses a fairly large amount of power.
Deep_Freeze.flavorText: Energy efficiency is important on EVERY planet.

Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.description: A biofuel-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface.
Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.flavorText: Slow progress, but it\'s worth it

Deep_Mining_Drill_Electric.description: A convenient drilling device that runs on electricity.

Deep_Mining_Drill_Oil.description: An oil-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface. Has even more storage space.

Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Deer.
Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Deer_Statue_Stone.description: A graceful deer etched in stone.

Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Dehumidifier.description: Powerful, portable protection against the effects of being underground.
Dehumidifier.flavorText: Powered by charcoal, the dehumidifier heavily reduces bacterial growth in caves by reducing dampness.

DesertWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Hyena.
DesertWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

DesertWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Antelope.
Desert_Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Columbian Mammoth.
Desert_Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Striker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Arid Striker.
Desert_Striker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Striker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Digested_Enzymes.description: Partially Digested Enzymes taken from the Stomach of Icarus Wildlife.

Dirt.description: Some rich Icarus soil extracted from the ground with a shovel.

Dirt_Corner.description: A simple corner to help with foundation building.

Dirt_Frame.description: A simple block of dirt that can serve as the foundation of a structure. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dirt_Ramp.description: A simple dirt ramp that can serve as basic vertical travesal. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dog_Accessory_D.description: An old harness fashioned into a jumpsuit for a very special dog. (A Laika dog accessory only)

Dog_Bowl_Food.description: A simple bowl to fill with food for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Food.flavorText: Wasn\'t this full a minute ago?

Dog_Bowl_Water.description: A simple bowl to fill with water for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Water.flavorText: A hydrated pet is a happy pet.

Dog_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_B1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_B2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_C1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_C1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_D1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_D2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_A1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_A2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_B1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_B2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_C1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D1_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D1_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D2_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D2_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dogtags_Lure.description: A flashy lure carefully crafted out of... dogtags?
Dogtags_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Dough_Bread.description: Makes bread, just add to a fire.

Dough_Flatbread.description: Makes flatbread, just add to a fire.

Drac_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Drac.
Drac_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Drac_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

DragonFly_Head.description: A preserved memory of a swamp insect.
DragonFly_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dreadwing_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Dreadwing.
Dreadwing_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dreadwing_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Dressing_Kit.description: Heals basic wounds, deep wounds, frostbite and heatstroke.

Dried_Avocado.description: A snack with a chewy texture and concentrated flavor
Dried_Avocado.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Banana.description: Thinly sliced banana dehydrated for long-term storage and easy transport.

Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A savory snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish.
Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Dried_Kiwifruit.description: Sliced and dried kiwifruit, good for a quick snack.

Dried_Meat_Generic.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Dried_Rhubarb.description: A healthy snack with a rather tart flavor.
Dried_Rhubarb.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A flavorful snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of saltwater fish.
Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Dried_Tomato.description: A snack with an intense sweet and savory flavor
Dried_Tomato.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Drill_Arrow.description: An experimental arrow which deals extra damage against Quarrites and can mine ores.
Drill_Arrow.flavorText: A motorized drill head allows it to burrow into objects when fired.

Dropship_Grenade_T4.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_T4.flavorText: Made on planet with the materials at hand, lets hope it works.

Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.flavorText: Another amazing innovation thanks to Sinotai

Drying_Rack.description: A rack for slowly drying various cuts of meat and curing leather.

Egg.description: A fresh chicken egg, can be cooked in all manner of ways.

Egg_Salad.description: Considered a delicacy back on earth.
Egg_Salad.flavorText: An interesting mix of protein and fruit.

Electric_Armor_Bench.description: Powered workbench for advanced textiles production and maintenance.

Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

Electric_Fireplace.description: An electric fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Electric_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Electric_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

Electric_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Electric_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Electric_Furnace_Large.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.
Electric_Furnace_Large.flavorText: Does a helmet count as safety goggles?

Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.description: Through a process of Electrolysis, oxygen is extracted from water.
Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Fresh air not polluted by poisonous Icarus gasses.

Electric_Stove.flavorText: Less explosive than using home made biofuel.

Electronics.description: A modular control unit, adaptable to most I/Os.

Elephant_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Elephant.
Elephant_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Elephant_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Elephant_Tusk.description: While not the biggest tusk one could find on Icarus, it\'s still a valuable source of bone.

Energy_Bar.description: A quickly made snack out of natural ingrediants.

Envirosuit.description: An entry-level S5 life support system from Xigo, Earth\'s largest employer.
Envirosuit.flavorText: In theory, a Xigo general issue \'Self-contained Surface Survival Suit System\' (S5) offers full body environmental containment and air processing. How many wore this before you is unclear. While no longer entirely air-tight, the suit should still provide sufficient protection to the average user.

Envirosuit_Deluxe.description: A rare, early-model First Cohort envirosuit, issued exclusively to pioneer prospectors on the planet.
Envirosuit_Deluxe.flavorText: Originally issued by the UDA, these suits have subsequently become valuable collectors\' items. No longer available for purchase.

Envirosuit_Inaris_Alpha.description: An envirosuit with plenty of slots for upgrades to keep on your person.
Envirosuit_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Now there\'s a few less things to carry around with you.

Envirosuit_Larkwell_Alpha.description: A highly upgradable Envirosuit with expanded storage. Purpose built for the prospector who wants to carry it all.
Envirosuit_Larkwell_Alpha.flavorText: This suit was designed based on information gathered in a Larkwell Survey. When citing the issues they faced, prospectors ranked "not enough pockets" as their fourth greatest challenge.

Envirosuit_Larkwell_Bravo.description: The Larkwell Bulwark is your defense against the elements. Integrated with adaptive climate control technology.
Envirosuit_Larkwell_Bravo.flavorText: Designed for savage environmental conditions. Many prospectors will not set foot in the fringe zone without their Bulwark equipped... Better to die comfortable.

Envirosuit_Larkwell_White.description: A specialised envirosuit designed for the Eden Scouts.

Envirosuit_Shengong.description: Enhanced heat resistance with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight heat protection and rapid 3D printability.

Envirosuit_Shengong_2.description: Offers reinforced insulation for cold-weather environments with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong_2.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight protection and rapid 3D printability.

Envirosuit_Tier2.description: A general issue S5 envirosuit with extended life support systems.
Envirosuit_Tier2.flavorText: The Xigo S5-II is a full-spectrum environmental protection jumpsuit, helmet and life-support system, offering an augment slot and extended oxygen capacity.

Envirosuit_Tier3.description: An enhanced and lightly armored S5 envirosuit offering more functionality and life support systems than the S5-II.
Envirosuit_Tier3.flavorText: The Xigo S5-X is a surprisingly high-spec unit for the price. A complete survival system, it features basic rebreather technology and ultra-high-density polyethylene construction, reducing weight and increasing strength.

Envirosuit_Tier4.description: An upgraded S5-II suit with expanded resource storage.
Envirosuit_Tier4.flavorText: On Earth they judge you by your shoes, on Icarus by your Envirosuit.

Envirosuit_Tier5.description: A lightweight HDPE S5 Envirosuit providing expanded upgrade slots, light armor and respectable storage.
Envirosuit_Tier5.flavorText: Plastic\'s come a long way since Tupperware

Envirosuit_Tier6.description: A lightly armored, double-module S5 suit with micro-texturing to reduce reflectivity.
Envirosuit_Tier6.flavorText: A 2124 survey registered the Xigo \'X\' as one of the most widely-recognized symbols in the world.

Envirosuit_Tier7.description: A broad spectrum, armored S5 envirosuit with dual module slots and decent resource capacity.
Envirosuit_Tier7.flavorText: Xigo don\'t just do this - they do everything.

Enzyme_Cannon_Hub.description: When Connected to Power and Given Condensed Enzymes will Charge Up. After Charging can be Triggered to Force Regrow trees in a surrounding area.

Enzyme_Elixir.description: When used Aggressive Enzyme-Enhanced Creatures will be drawn to you.

Epoxy.description: A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.
Epoxy.flavorText: UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.

Equix_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Equix.
Equix_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Equix_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Exotic_Delivery_Interface.description: Allows you to order a Delivery Pod for Exotic Retrieval
Exotic_Delivery_Interface.flavorText: Part of the Icarus Orbital Exchange System developed by Sinotai.

Exotic_Harvester.description: A machine that harvests volatile raw exotics from trees in volcanic regions.
Exotic_Harvester.flavorText: A new machine for new types of Exotics!

Exotic_Processor.description: A machine that can process Volatile Exotics into usable materials.
Exotic_Processor.flavorText: You probably should still keep a good distance from this thing.

Exotic_Red.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Exotic_Red.flavorText: Like the other one, but Red.

Exotic_Red_Raw.description: Requires heavy processing with the Organic Residue Cleanser to be of any use.

Exotic_Uranium_Collector.description: A portable mining unit powered by electricity, used to extract resources from Uranium deposits. Creatures will attack this device when active.
Exotic_Uranium_Collector.flavorText: Warning: Uranium extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Explorers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to help you on your travels.

Exposed_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Ceiling_Light_Foggy.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Extractor_Biofuel.description: A portable mining unit powered by Biofuel, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Biofuel.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Extractor_Electric.description: A portable mining unit powered by Electricity, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Electric.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Extractor_Meta.description: A portable mining unit powered by the IC-001 Power Source, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Meta.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Fabricator.flavorText: Surprisingly simple for such a versatile machine, the Fabricator combines a flatbed CNC router with limited 3D alloy printing capabilities.

FactionMission_Tech1.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.
FactionMission_Tech1.flavorText: Some sort of signal or force transmitter.

FactionMission_Tech2.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

FactionMission_Tech3.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

FactionMission_TechRecombined.flavorText: While the precise operation of this Larkwell Martinez prototype is confidential, general specifications suggest it uses the mass-distorting effects of exotic matter to generate a diametric field intended to dampen local gravitic influence.

Faction_Mission_Laser.description: A high intensity strontium vapor laser prototype.
Faction_Mission_Laser.flavorText: Exactly why Group 15 had experimental weapons grade laser equipment lying around is anyone\'s guess.

Farmers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your farming needs.
Farmers_Backpack.flavorText: Spray the weeds and keep the seeds

Farmers_Shotgun.description: A crude shotgun hastily pulled together
Farmers_Shotgun.flavorText: A basic addition to your arsenal

Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.description: A general-purpose planter bed for your crops. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.flavorText: A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.

Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.description: A sturdy option for farming with water intake for faster crop growth. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to a water network

Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.description: An advanced option for the busy farmer. Supports inputs from both Power and Water networks for increased crop growth speed. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.description: Currently the best option for a farmer on Icarus. It uses a mix of nutrient dense mist and rich soil to promote growth and yield.
Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Fatty_Tbone.description: The largest of steaks can typically only be found in the largest of creatures

Fatty_Tbone_Cooked.description: A fiercely won, delicious steak dinner

Fatty_Tbone_Dried.description: A large, fatty piece of dried meat

Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that reduces the threat while stealth and improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the threat while stealth and greatly improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.description: An attachment that improves swimming and climbing speed, and reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves swimming and climbing speed, and greatly reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Fertility_Serum_Boar.description: Primes a Male Boar for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Boar.

Fertility_Serum_Buffalo.description: Primes a Male Buffalo for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Buffalo.

Fertility_Serum_Chicken.description: Primes a Rooster for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Chicken.

Fertility_Serum_Cow.description: Primes a Bull for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Cow.

Fertility_Serum_Moa.description: Primes a Male Moa for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Moa.

Fertility_Serum_Pig.description: Primes a Male Pig for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Pig.

Fertility_Serum_Raptor.description: Primes a Male Raptor for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Raptor.

Fertility_Serum_Sheep.description: Primes a Ram for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Sheep.

Fertility_Serum_Slinker.description: Primes a Male Slinker for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Slinker.

Fertility_Serum_SwampBird.description: Primes a Male Ubis for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Ubis.

Fertility_Serum_Tundra_Monkey.description: Primes a Male Gribber for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Gribber.

Fertility_Serum_Wolf.description: Primes a Male Wolf for mating. Once primed, will seek out and fertilize a nearby Female Wolf. Applies to Wolves found in both Forest and Arctic biomes.

Fiber.description: A bundle of soft fiber, highly useful.
Fiber.flavorText: Fiber is collected from bast, the strong inner bark of certain flowering plants.

Fiber_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of fiber, to attract more fish.
Fiber_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

FireExtinguisher.description: A canister of compressed flame-extinguishing liquid. Refill using water devices.

FireWhacker.flavorText: Discovered in prehistory, the fire whacker represents an effective, if unsophisticated tactic: Attack the flames until they surrender.

Fire_Arrow.flavorText: \'One of the good things about being this far from Earth, there\'s no-one to tell you not to play with fire.\' - Sol Berlinski

Fireplace.description: Cooks food swiftly and safely. Basically a large enclosed firepit, for a more homely feel.
Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap.description: The final step in a fireplace.

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap_Half.description: The final half-sized step in a fireplace.

Fireplace_Chimney_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Fish_Chunk_Stew.description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with tender chunks of fish and vegetables in a rich and savory broth.
Fish_Chunk_Stew.flavorText: Chop \'em up, cook \'em up, eat \'em up.

Fish_Chunks.description: A pile of roughly diced fish.

Fish_Fillet_Pie.description: A comforting and hearty dish made with a creamy filling of mixed fish and vegetables.
Fish_Fillet_Pie.flavorText: Stuffed to the brim with fish.

Fish_Wall_Mount.description: You may display your favourite catch here for all to see.

Fishing_Bench.description: A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.

Flame_Thrower.description: A biofuel powered device which ejects fuel and ignites it when thrown. This can be filled in a composter.
Flame_Thrower.flavorText: Sure beats a can of aerosol and a lighter.

Flare_Arrow.description: Projects your position into the sky.
Flare_Arrow.flavorText: The lost among us lean heavily on this launchable marker.

Flare_Blue.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a blue light.

Flare_Green.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a green light.

Flare_Gun.description: An Instrument which can be used to project your position into the sky.

Flare_Red.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a red light.

Flare_Yellow.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a yellow light.
Flare_Yellow.flavorText: Typically used to light up environments.

Flashlight.description: An LED flashlight for illuminating dark corners. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

Flat_Solar_Panel.description: This solar panel needs to be in direct sunlight to create power. Can be placed on any flat or angled surface.
Flat_Solar_Panel.flavorText: As effective under this star as any other.

Flightless_Tank_Head.description: A preserved memory of a horned beast.
Flightless_Tank_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Flightless_Tank_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Sandhorn.
Flightless_Tank_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Flint_Arrow.description: Flies further, hits harder than stone or bone.
Flint_Arrow.flavorText: Knappable flint provides a sharper arrowhead and greater penetration than stone or bone.

Flow_Meter.description: Connect this to any resource network for a breakdown of flow rates and devices.

Flying_Tank_Head.description: A preserved memory of a huge beast.
Flying_Tank_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Flying_Tank_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Ravager.
Flying_Tank_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Food_Animal_Feed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Food_Animal_Feed_Bean.description: A feed that promotes defence and survival.

Food_Animal_Feed_Carrot.description: A feed that promotes short and fast travel.

Food_Animal_Feed_CarryWeight.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Food_Animal_Feed_Corn.description: A feed that promotes long distance travel.

Food_Animal_Feed_High_Quality.description: Created in the Ranching Station. When fed to animals, increases food effectiveness and provides all-round bonuses.

Food_Animal_Feed_Mushroom.description: A feed that promotes rough terrain and rocky traversal.

Food_Animal_Feed_Potato.description: A feed that will help animals survive volcanic environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Pumpkin.description: A feed that will help animals survive arctic environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Speed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Food_Animal_Feed_Squash.description: A feed that will help animals survive desert environments.

Food_Berry_Bar.description: Full of energy for long hikes.
Food_Berry_Bar.flavorText: Tastes much better than seed crackers.

Food_Bread.description: Wholesome, filling and slow to spoil.

Food_Corn_Soup.description: A classic dish, even without shredded chicken.
Food_Corn_Soup.flavorText: Boosts stamina and improves endurance. Drains nostalgia.

Food_Creamed_Corn.description: Pureed corn, animal fat and water, easy to digest.
Food_Creamed_Corn.flavorText: Slow release energy with a baby-food consistency, boosting health and stamina.

Food_Crumbed_Fish_Fillet.description: Battered in breadcrumbs, lightly fried, boosts health and stamina.

Food_Fish_Dish.description: A simple curry with a large health boost.
Food_Fish_Dish.flavorText: Not the best fish curry in the galaxy, but far from the worst.

Food_Flatbread.flavorText: Simple to bake and easy to store, boosts health and stamina regen.

Food_Fried_Soy_Beans.description: Boosts health, lifts stamina, enhances self-satisfaction.
Food_Fried_Soy_Beans.flavorText: One of the original crops intended to sustain humanity on its first new extra-solar world.

Food_Fruit_Pie.description: Watermelon plus berries and pastry creates a passable, stamina boosting pie.

Food_Fruit_Salad.description: An all-natural, surprisingly delicious melon-berry mix, boosts stamina and health.
Food_Fruit_Salad.flavorText: A divisive dessert, loved or hated, and very little in between.

Food_Hearty_Salad.description: Gives a boost to health and stamina.

Food_Honey_Bar.description: A sweet and tasty snack for your travels.

Food_Meat_Pie.description: A rustic pie that delivers a big health boost.
Food_Meat_Pie.flavorText: "Stress cannot exist in the presence of a pie." - David Mamet

Food_Meat_Stew.flavorText: Some foods profit from rustic conditions. Boosts health, lifts stamina.

Food_Mushroom_Soup.description: A passable impression of a classic dish.
Food_Mushroom_Soup.flavorText: While some critics regard this meal as pointless if made without butter, purists do not last long on Icarus.

Food_Pickled_Carrot.flavorText: Like many other ancient ways, pickling has found a place on Icarus.

Food_Pickled_Tomato.description: Increases stamina, health regeneration, and shared XP.

Food_Potato_Bread.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Food_Potato_Carrot_Fries.description: Delivers a wide range of health benefits.

Food_Pumpkin_Bread.description: A noticeably yellow loaf that significantly increases endurance.

Food_Roasted_Vegetables.description: A melange of cooked vegetables, provides a serious stamina boost.

Food_Seed_Bread.flavorText: Better for you than white bread... doesn\'t taste quite as good.

Food_Seed_Cracker.flavorText: This cracker resembles hardtack. Upholding the explorers tradition of terrible snack choices.

Food_Shepherds_Pie.description: An all rounder, this will keep you going.

Food_Trough.description: A basic trough to provide food for juvenile and tamed creatures. Accepts most fresh fruits and vegetables.

Food_Trough_Glass.description: A Glass feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Glass.flavorText: A feeder with a little bit of class.

Food_Trough_Large.description: A basic wooden feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Large.flavorText: Like the smaller one, only larger

Food_Trough_Metal.description: A Metal feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Metal.flavorText: Perfect for when you need to feed a lot of animals, fast.

Food_Trough_Rustic.description: A Rustic looking feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Rustic.flavorText: For animals that like that rustic look.

Food_Trough_T4.description: A feeder which can create different types of animal gruel depending on what is placed inside.
Food_Trough_T4.flavorText: Takes the pressure out of cooking.

Food_Vegetable_Pie.description: Warm, health-giving, stamina-boosting - virtue in every pie.
Food_Vegetable_Pie.flavorText: If this pie had a slogan, it might be \'Stay delicious\'.

Food_Wild_Salad.description: Mixed pieces of squash and pumpkin at room temperature.
Food_Wild_Salad.flavorText: At home among the stars, yet no closer to answering the age old question: \'What is a salad, exactly?\'

Fortification_Concrete_Gate.description: A solid gate which can be used to create a fortified encampment.

Fortification_Concrete_Platform.description: A wall attachment that allows you to look over the top of your wall safely.

Fortification_Concrete_Spikes.description: Attachment for fortification walls that damage creatures who attack.

Fortification_Concrete_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the concrete fortification walls.

Fortification_Stone_Gate.description: A large, strong stone gate fortification which can be opened and closed.

Fortification_Stone_Platform.description: A wall attachment that allows you to look over the top of your wall safely.

Fortification_Stone_Spikes.description: Attachment for fortification walls that damage creatures who attack.

Fortification_Stone_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the stone fortification walls.

Fortification_Wood_Gate.description: A large, strong wood gate fortification which can be opened and closed.
Fortification_Wood_Gate.flavorText: From safety to wilderness, an entryway to the danger of Icarus.

Fortification_Wood_Spikes.description: A large collection of spiked defenses which can be mounted to fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Spikes.flavorText: An extra layer of defense, prevents wildlife from working their way through your walls.

Fortification_Wood_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the wood fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Walkway.flavorText: A protected vantage point to survey the nearby area.

Fortification_Wood_Wall.description: A large, strong wood wall fortification.
Fortification_Wood_Wall.flavorText: Claim your territory through the wonders of construction.

Frag_Grenade.flavorText: Homemade explosives are the best kind.

Frag_Grenade_Impact.description: A fragmentation grenade that will explode on impact.

French_Onion_Soup.description: A hearty broth topped with onions.
French_Onion_Soup.flavorText: A hug in a bowl when nights grow cold.

Freshwater_Fillet_Curry.description: A spicy and aromatic dish made with tender pieces of fish cooked in a rich and creamy sauce with a blend of herbs and spices.
Freshwater_Fillet_Curry.flavorText: Spend the time on the sauce and reap the rewards.

Freshwater_Fish_Fillet.description: A neatly trimmed fillet ready for cooking.

Fried_Chicken.flavorText: Reminds you of old earth fast food chains.

Fried_Chunky_Vegetables.description: These veges are deep-fried until crispy and golden.
Fried_Chunky_Vegetables.flavorText: Another great meal from your Potbelly Stove.

Fried_Fish_Chunks.description: An easy snack for the hungry prospector who\'s short on time.
Fried_Fish_Chunks.flavorText: Not as fancy as a fillet, but just as filling.

Frozen_Banana.description: A preserved banana frozen into a sweet treat.
Frozen_Banana.flavorText: Cold, sweet, and surprisingly refreshing after a long haul.

Frozen_Ore.description: A chunk of frozen ore, must be heated to identify and use.
Frozen_Ore.flavorText: Avoid direct contact with eyes and/or skin.

Frozen_Wood.description: Frozen Wood drilled from an old root system underneath the ice.
Frozen_Wood.flavorText: Needs to be defrosted to be useful.

Frozen_Wool.description: A patch of frozen wool taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Fruit_Muffin.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Fruit_Snack_Pack.description: A fresh fruit snack pack, good for long trips.
Fruit_Snack_Pack.flavorText: Just like the ones that kids have.

Fur.description: One of nature\'s more perfect insulation materials.
Fur.flavorText: Fur remains an exceptional material, especially in the terrazone, where temperatures are significantly cooler.

Fur_Arms.description: Heavy fur gloves, extremely warm with moderate physical protection.
Fur_Arms.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Fur_Chest.description: An armored fur jacket, giving warmth and reasonable damage protection.
Fur_Chest.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Fur_Feet.description: Heavily insulated fur boots, offering moderate physical protection.
Fur_Feet.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Fur_Head.description: Heavy, warm and moderately protective headgear.
Fur_Head.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Fur_Legs.description: Heavy, strengthened fur leg armor, warm and moderately protective.
Fur_Legs.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Fur_Stack.description: A neatly rolled stack containing 200 Fur. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Fur_Stack.flavorText: Fur remains an exceptional material, especially in the terrazone, where temperatures are significantly cooler.

Gamey_Meat.description: Raw gamey meat, typically found amongst the more passive wildlife

Gamey_Meat_Cooked.description: A reasonably well cooked piece of meat

Gamey_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Garlic.description: A pungent bulb used to elevate savoury dishes.
Garlic.flavorText: One can never have too much garlic in a dish.

Garlic_Bread.description: Toasted bread dripping with garlic and butter.

Garlic_Butter.description: Creamy butter infused with garlic\'s bold flavour.
Garlic_Butter.flavorText: Luxury spread, one bite at a time.

Garlic_Pizza.description: A simple, aromatic pizza topped with garlic.

Gas_Fireplace.description: A biofuel powered fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Gas_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Gas_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

Gas_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Gas_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Copper.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Gold.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Oxite.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Copper.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Gold.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Oxite.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Copper.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geothermal_Bat_Head.description: What remains of a mutated bat-like creature.
Geothermal_Bat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Geothermal_Bat_Trophy.description: A Trophy of a mutated bat like creature.
Geothermal_Bat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Geothermal_Spider_Head.description: A preserved memory of a many legged creature.
Geothermal_Spider_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Geothermal_Spider_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ghillie_Arms.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Arms.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Chest.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Chest.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Feet.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Feet.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Head.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Head.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Legs.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Legs.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghost_Crocodile_Head.description: A preserved memory of a giant lizard.
Ghost_Crocodile_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ghost_Crocodile_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Trapjaw.
Ghost_Crocodile_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Giant_Roach_Head.description: A preserved memory of a walking jellyfish.
Giant_Roach_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Giant_Roach_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Clicker.
Giant_Roach_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Giant_Steak.description: A giant steak from the belly of only the largest creatures.
Giant_Steak.flavorText: This should keep you going for a while

Giant_Steak_Cooked.description: A prime cut from the larger beasts

Giant_Steak_Dried.description: A large dried piece of meat

Glass.description: Despite its imperfections, a workable sheet of glass.
Glass.flavorText: Reflected in a sheet of glass is a simple fact: What looks familiar, is in fact a crystalline lattice unlike anything on Earth.

Glass_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Glass_Advanced_Beam_Set_Tempered.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Glass_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Beam_Tempered.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam_Tempered.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Bottle.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Glass_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

Glass_Curved_Set_Tempered.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

Glass_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

Glass_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles_Temper.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

Glass_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

Glass_Diagonal_Set_Tempered.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

Glass_Door_Reinforced.flavorText: Like the basic glass, but tougher.

Glass_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Glass_Half_Pitch_Tempered.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Glass_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Glass_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Glass_Halfpiece_Tempered.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Glass_Halfpiece_Tempered.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Glass_Jar.description: A roughly made, but perfectly serviceable mason jar.
Glass_Jar.flavorText: This jar is empty, but like the many gaps in our understanding of this planet, is waiting to be filled.

Glass_Jar_Honey.description: A handy way to store your honey.

Glass_Jar_Jam.flavorText: It\'s not just jam. You hold in your hand an irreducible symbol of humanity\'s commitment to settling an alien world. Strongly increases max stamina.

Glass_Ramp.description: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
Glass_Ramp.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Ramp_Tempered.description: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
Glass_Ramp_Tempered.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Roof_Corner.description: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

Glass_Roof_Corner_Tempered.description: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

Glass_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

Glass_Roof_CurvedAngles_Tempered.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

Glass_Wall.description: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
Glass_Wall.flavorText: Throw no stones, but hold \'R\' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Wall_Angle.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Glass_Wall_Angle_Tempered.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Glass_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Glass_Wall_Curved_Tempered.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Glass_Wall_Tempered.description: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
Glass_Wall_Tempered.flavorText: Throw no stones, but hold \'R\' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glassworking_Bench_V2.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench_V2.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Glazed_Carrots.description: Sweet, tender carrots coated in a glossy glaze.

Gorse_Flower_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Great_Hunt_Device.description: A Communications Device Provided by Norex to Track down Apex Creatures in the World.
Great_Hunt_Device.flavorText: The Norex Operations Verification Assembly - Your one stop shop for everything black market.

GreenTea.description: Unprocessed leaves from a variant of the common tea tree.

Grilled_Freshwater_Fish.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Grilled_Saltwater_Fish.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Gruel.description: Will satisfy your hunger, but not your taste buds.

Guano.description: Excrement of some bat-like creatures in Icarus, very rich in Nitrogen and Phosphorus.
Guano.flavorText: Surely there is a use for this.

Gunpowder.description: Creating and solving problems for over one thousand years.
Gunpowder.flavorText: \'Not the best we could do, but not the worst either\' - Sol Berlinski

Guns_Attachment_Damage_1.description: An attachment that increases damage for guns.
Guns_Attachment_Damage_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Guns_Attachment_Damage_2.description: An attachment that increases damage for guns.
Guns_Attachment_Damage_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Hammer_Attachment_Repair_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your speed of repairs.
Hammer_Attachment_Repair_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid repair hammer at an Alteration Bench.

Hard_Leather_Arms.description: Gauntlets, providing basic protection and insulation.

Hard_Leather_Chest.description: A basic cuirass, gives limited insulation and damage protection

Hard_Leather_Feet.description: Roughly made boots, increase temperature and damage resistance.

Hard_Leather_Head.description: Headgear, providing some insulation and damage protection.

Hard_Leather_Legs.description: Simple chausses, improving insulation and damage resistance.

Hay_Bale.description: A bundle of hay perfect for decorating.

Hazmat_Arms.description: Offers Complete Protection Against Radiation at the Cost of Physical Protection.
Hazmat_Arms.flavorText: If you can still breathe, it\'s working.

Hazmat_Chest.description: Offers Complete Protection Against Radiation at the Cost of Physical Protection.
Hazmat_Chest.flavorText: If you can still breathe, it\'s working.

Health_Elixir.description: Providing a huge amount of health recovery.
Health_Elixir.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Health_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a decent amount of health recovery.
Health_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Health_Remedy.description: Providing a small amount of health recovery.
Health_Remedy.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Heater_Large.description: A powered heating device for warming larger areas.

Heavy_Obsidian_Arms.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Arms.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly helps prevent cave sickness and greatly improves health regeneration while in caves.
Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Storm_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves stamina regeneration in storms and exposure resistance.

Hitching_Post.description: A small structure that allows you to hitch animals to it.

Homestead_Soft_Sofa_Double.description: A soft sofa which can be used to relax.

Homestead_Soft_Sofa_Single.description: A soft armchair which can be used to relax.

Homestead_Spinning_Wheel.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Swing_Chair.description: A Cosy Chair perfect for Decorating.

Homestead_Wall_Candle.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Weapon_Rack_Single.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Homestead_Weather_Vane.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Well.description: A simple and durable way to collect rain water.
Homestead_Well.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

Honey.description: Freshly processed Honey, ready to eat or add to your food.
Honey.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Honey_Mead.description: Delicious Honey Mead, a refreshing treat.

Honey_Pastry.description: A baked good generously drizzled with honey.

Honey_Tea.description: A mild honey tea with small health benefits.
Honey_Tea.flavorText: Nothing is better than the smell of fresh honey tea on a cold winters night.

Honeycomb.description: A raw source of food that can be processed into Honey and Beeswax using a Mortar and Pestle, or Beehive Extractor.
Honeycomb.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.
