IceMammoth_Spear.description: An impressive spear crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Spear.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

IceMammoth_Throwing_Spear.description: An impressive Javelin crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

IceMammoth_Trap.description: Snaps shut and pins anything that is ensnared for a few seconds.
IceMammoth_Trap.flavorText: Almost like a Venus Fly Trap - but with Icicles

IceMammoth_Trophy_Chandelier.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Chandelier.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Trophy_Feature.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Feature.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Trophy_Head.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Head.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ice_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Ice_Armor_Fragment.description: An ice armor fragment taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Ice_Beam.description: A beam that provides style and function.
Ice_Beam.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Borer.description: A biofuel-powered drill capable of extracting Super-Cooled Ice or Frozen Wood from Arctic areas.
Ice_Borer.flavorText: Slow progress, but it\'s worth it

Ice_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

Ice_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

Ice_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

Ice_Floor.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Half_Pitch.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.
Ice_Halfpiece.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Ramp.description: A chilly option for any construction.
Ice_Ramp.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Roof_Corner.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

Ice_Wall.description: A chilly base for your base.
Ice_Wall.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Wall_Angle.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Ice_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Icebox_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to prevent your food from spoiling on long journeys. Will run for 1 hour on a full charge. Can be recharged at a Charging Station.

Infected_Bark.description: A piece of twisted and crumbling bark, can be stripped for Epoxy. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Infected_Bark.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

Interior_Wood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Interior_Wood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Interior_Wood_Crate_Medium.description: A storage unit for items and gear.

Interior_Wood_Crate_Small.description: A small storage unit for items.

Interior_Wood_Cupboard.description: A place to keep items, gear and the rest.

Interior_Wood_Cupboard_Small.description: A small storage unit for items.

Iron_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Iron_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Iron_Bucket.description: A bucket that can be filled with water.
Iron_Bucket.flavorText: Everyone should at least have one of these.

Iron_Door.description: A rough but resilient corrugated aluminium door.
Iron_Door.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Floor.description: Lightweight but resilient sheet aluminium flooring.
Iron_Floor.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Iron_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Iron_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Iron_Hammer.description: Maintain structures against the wrath of Icarus.
Iron_Hammer.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Iron_Lure.description: A heavier lure carefully crafted out of iron, to attract more fish.
Iron_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Iron_Nail.flavorText: A nail works in two directions: through friction in the axial direction, and shear strength laterally.

Iron_Ramp.description: A lightweight sheet aluminium ramp or roofing sheet.
Iron_Ramp.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Roof_Corner.description: A strong, lightweight insert for angled roofs.

Iron_Shears.description: Used to Shear Sheep and Collect its Wool
Iron_Shears.flavorText: Just like they had in the old country.

Iron_Sign_Small.description: An iron sign to display information.

Iron_TrapDoor.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Wall.flavorText: Cycle for other construction variants. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Window.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Wood_Arrow.description: A toxin-coated Arrow, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Arrow.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Axe.description: A toxin-coated Axe that allows you to delicately extract Infected Wood when chopping trees.
Iron_Wood_Axe.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Bolt.description: A toxin-coated Bolt, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Bolt.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Knife.description: A toxin-coated Knife that allows you to delicately extract Acidic Glands from animals when skinning.
Iron_Wood_Knife.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Pickaxe.description: A toxin-coated Pickaxe that allows you to delicately extract Noxious Crust when mining.
Iron_Wood_Pickaxe.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Sickle.description: A toxin-coated Sickle, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife. Gives a chance to receive larger harvests.
Iron_Wood_Sickle.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Sledgehammer.description: A toxin-coated Hammer that allows you to delicately extract Noxious Crust when mining.
Iron_Wood_Sledgehammer.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Spear.description: A toxin-coated Spear, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Spear.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Throwing_Knife.description: A toxin-coated Throwing Knife, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Throwing_Spear.description: A toxin-coated Throwing Spear, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Item_Medicine_Bag.description: A sturdy satchel which can carry all sorts of medical supplies. Allows instant use of medicine inside the bag.
Item_Medicine_Bag.flavorText: You are a real doctor now.

Jackhammer.description: A high-impact mining device built to transfer raw force directly into the earth.
Jackhammer.flavorText: Because sometimes a pickaxe just isn\'t angry enough.

Jaguar_Black_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Black Jaguar.
Jaguar_Black_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Jaguar_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Jaguar.
Jaguar_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Jerry_Can_Water.description: Large bulky water can, useful for travelling.
Jerry_Can_Water.flavorText: Can also be used as weights in Defence Force Training.

Jerrycan.description: Canister for biofuel storage, which can be filled at a composter.

Juvenile_Ape_Head.description: A preserved memory of a beast.
Juvenile_Ape_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Juvenile_Ape_Trophy.flavorText: Not the greatest ape, but a menacing decoration.

Juvenile_Rock_Golem_Trophy.flavorText: How did you stuff a creature made of rock?

Kea_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Kea.
Kea_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Kea_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Kit_Floor_Torch.description: A free-standing torch requiring sticks for fuel.
Kit_Floor_Torch.flavorText: Oxygen levels may be a little lower, but fire provides light well enough.

Kit_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Kit_Generator.flavorText: Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

Kit_Machining_Bench.description: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with basic machine tools.

Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A simple tool for crafting resins, pastes, medicines and more.
Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.flavorText: The tool of chefs, herbalists, apothecaries and alchemists.

Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A more efficient oxidizer for processing oxite into oxygen.
Kit_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Place oxite and an appropriate container into the dissolver to start filling it. Requires sulfur for fuel.

Kit_Skinning_Bench.description: Fully processes animal carcasses for more resources.
Kit_Skinning_Bench.flavorText: As any hunter knows, preparing an animal can be a slow, messy, wasteful task. The right tools make all the difference.

Kit_Stone_Furnace.description: A simple stone furnace for smelting iron, copper and steel.
Kit_Stone_Furnace.flavorText: Bronze-age technology, spread to the stars.

Kit_Wall_Torch.description: A mounted flame for adorning shelter walls.
Kit_Wall_Torch.flavorText: Lower oxygen levels produce a dirty, but workable flame.

Kit_Wood_Cupboard.description: A place to put necessities ... and the rest.

Kitchen_Bench.description: A modular workspace for cooking and concocting complex recipes.
Kitchen_Bench.flavorText: Prep advanced food recipes here to assist on your adventures

Kitchen_Corner_Bench.description: Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.

Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Kitchen_Storage.description: A compact module for all your kitchen storage needs.
Kitchen_Storage.flavorText: For the demanding Icarus ingredient hoarder, a small module with 40 storage slots.

Kitchen_Stove.flavorText: A well-crafted, solidly insulated stove for discerning off-world chefs.

Kiwi_Fruit.description: Sweet and Refreshing and a little bit Tangy.
Kiwi_Fruit.flavorText: Also known as a Chinese Gooseberry

Kiwi_Head.description: A preserved memory of a small flightless bird.
Kiwi_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Kiwi_Nest.description: A hastily built kiwi nest for establishing a new colony on Icarus.
Kiwi_Nest.flavorText: Pretty good, even if it only took 5 minutes.

Kiwi_Trophy.description: A preserved flightless bird, that once lived on Icarus.
Kiwi_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Kiwifruit_Jam.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Kiwifruit_Sorbet.description: A delicious frozen dessert made from local ingredients.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases your chance of gathering leather from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering leather from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.description: An attachment that increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_1.description: An attachment that adds a chance to obtain a vestige when skinning.
Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_2.description: An attachment that adds a chance to obtain a vestige when skinning.
Knife_Attachment_VestigeChance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Komodo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Komodo.
Komodo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Komodo_Statue_Stone.description: A fearsome foe made of stone.
Komodo_Statue_Stone.flavorText: They are cute when they aren\'t charging you.

Komodo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Kumara.description: A sweet potato, typically with red skin and yellow or orange flesh.
Kumara.flavorText: Often found in Pacific island and Maori cuisine.

Lamb_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lamb_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Land_Shark_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Landshark.
Land_Shark_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Landing_Pad_Player.description: When placed, new dropships will land in this location. You can call your dropship to this location, if unoccupied. Requires Electricity to use.
Landing_Pad_Player.flavorText: What goes up, must come down.

Landshark_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lantern.description: A portable, animal-fat-powered light, can be refilled on crafting bench.

Large_Advanced_Aquarium.description: A very fancy large fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.
Large_Advanced_Aquarium.flavorText: The latest technology for storing your fish friends.

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Arms.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Arms.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Chest.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Chest.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Feet.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Feet.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Head.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Head.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Legs.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Legs.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Arms.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Arms.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Chest.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Chest.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Feet.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Feet.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Head.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Head.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Legs.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Legs.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Laser_Attachment_Electric.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Electric.

Laser_Attachment_Fire.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Fire.

Laser_Attachment_Frost.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Frost.

Laser_Attachment_Poison.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Fire.

Laser_Pistol.description: A compact device that creates hard light bullets through a complication process of focusing energy through a ruby lens.

Lava_Broodling_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Lava Broodling.
Lava_Broodling_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Hunter_Attachment.description: An attachment that grants fire damage and chance to burn on melee weapons.
Lava_Hunter_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Lava_Hunter_Backpack.description: A powered backpack that emits an aura of warmth. Can be recharged at the Charging Station.
Lava_Hunter_Backpack.flavorText: Who would have thought carrying around a lava core was good idea.

Lava_Hunter_Broodling_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Chair.description: A Throne crafted from the spoils of victory against a Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Chair.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Feature.description: A preserved specimen from a Lava Hunter that once lived on Icarus.
Lava_Hunter_Feature.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Hunter_Horn.description: A piece of horn taken from the body of a great beast.

Lava_Hunter_Magma.description: A piece of tough magma taken from the body of a great beast.

Lava_Hunter_Mine.description: When placed will break open Lava Hunter Eggs and Release Bombers.
Lava_Hunter_Mine.flavorText: Let\'s see how they like it.

Lava_Hunter_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Lava Hunter Creature.

Lava_Hunter_Sickle.description: A Sickle crafted from the spoils of victory against a Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Sickle.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Viscid_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ignari.
Lava_Viscid_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Viscid_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Layered_Plating.flavorText: Simple enough to make on the surface, strong enough to protect from harsh weather.

Leather.flavorText: Tanning stabilizes collagens, ensuring the skin does not rot when wet.

Leather_Arms.description: Gauntlets, providing basic protection and insulation.
Leather_Arms.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Leather_Chest.description: A basic cuirass, gives limited insulation and damage protection
Leather_Chest.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Leather_Curtain_Door.flavorText: A door for those unimpressed by hinges and handles.

Leather_Feet.description: Roughly made boots, increase temperature and damage resistance.
Leather_Feet.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Leather_Head.description: Headgear, providing some insulation and damage protection.
Leather_Head.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Leather_Legs.description: Simple chausses, improving insulation and damage resistance.
Leather_Legs.flavorText: Hunt in style. But more importantly, warmth.

Legs_Attachment_Jump_1.description: An attachment that increases jump height and decreases stamina cost.
Legs_Attachment_Jump_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Legs_Attachment_Jump_2.description: An attachment that increases jump height and decreases stamina cost.
Legs_Attachment_Jump_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Light_Worklamp_Omnidirectional.description: A fluorescent lamp for illuminating a large area.

LightningRod_Basic.description: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction.
LightningRod_Basic.flavorText: The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

LightningRod_Platinum.description: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction. Can be connected to a power network to charge batteries when struck.
LightningRod_Platinum.flavorText: The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

Lily.description: A wildflower reputed to have medicinal properties.
Lily.flavorText: Adapting to the exotics-infused soil of Icarus, this lily has acquired unusual and useful new chemical properties.

Limestone.description: A chunk of limestone that can be used in a variety of ways.
Limestone.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.
Limestone_Advanced_Beam_Set.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Limestone_Beam.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Frame.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Halfpiece.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Ramp.description: An elegant option for any construction.
Limestone_Ramp.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Wall.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Wall_Curved.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Lithium_Arrow.description: An electrically charged arrow, carefully crafted using lithium harvested from Icarus.

Lithium_Axe.description: An axe expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Axe.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Bolt.description: An electrically charged bolt, carefully crafted using lithium harvested from Icarus.

Lithium_Bow.description: A bow expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Bow.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Crossbow.description: A crossbow expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Crossbow.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Knife.description: A knife expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Knife.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Ore.description: The core component for the creation of high tier energy storage devices.

Lithium_Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Pickaxe.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Refined.description: Refined Lithium that is ready to be used in the creation of batteries and electrical components.

Lithium_Shield.description: A shield expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Shield.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Throwing_Spear.description: A javelin expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Longbow.description: A powerful, but heavy long-range weapon.
Longbow.flavorText: Xeno-biologists hurriedly altered the genes of the tree from which this weapon is made, so that it might thrive on Icarus, never imagining that one day, a bow would be fashioned from it.

Machete.description: A heavy duty blade, highly durable but less suitable for skinning.

MakeshiftRadio.description: A makeshift radio for basic offworld communication.

Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Woolly Mammoth.
Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mammoth_Tusk.description: A fortune in ivory from a titan reborn; a small step towards revealing Icarus\'s secrets.
Mammoth_Tusk.flavorText: Theories suggest that when exotic material present in plant life is ingested, it affects cellular reproduction in animals. The exact mechanism is unclear, with speculation that some varieties of exotics possess negative mass, producing relativistic micro-effects. Analysis of this specimen will reveal more.

Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Head.description: A preserved memory of a radioactive beast.
Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Skulmutt Prime.
Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mange_Wolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a radioactive beast.
Mange_Wolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mange_Wolf_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Skulmutt.
Mange_Wolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Manufacturer.description: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with industrial equipment.

Masonry_Bench.description: Tools for working and shaping stone.
Masonry_Bench.flavorText: The art of stonework is untouched by the distance between worlds.

Masonry_Bench_T3.description: A manual workspace for detailed stonework and crafting.
Masonry_Bench_T3.flavorText: The skill and precision of a mason can never be replaced by machines...

Masonry_Bench_T4.description: Powered bench for heavy stonework and carving.

Material_Processor.description: Swiftly craft advanced ingredients and resources.

Medic_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your medical needs.

Medicine_Bench.description: Used for creating tonics, pills and other medicines.

MetaResource.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
MetaResource.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

Meta_Agave_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Agave Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Provides extended immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporarily protects againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Bravo.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Arrow_Set_Inaris_Alpha.description: 25 good value arrows, nothing less. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Ballistic.description: A set of 25 arrows that explode on impact in addition to the damage from the initial hit. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Bleed.description: A set of 25 barbed arrows that cause bleeding, lasting 30s and dealing 3-7 damage per second. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Standard.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Tazer.description: A set of 25 arrows that can slow its target for 4s, dealing 40-120 damage over that time period. The stronger the target, the more likely it is to resist the effects. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.description: Five low-cost, metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.flavorText: If you hit, it\'s skill, if you miss, it\'s the rapidly crafted, low quality projectiles.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.description: Five arrows tipped with a rapid-action nerve agent that slows targets. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.flavorText: Additive manufacturing became the production process of choice following much needed advances in micro-recycling, which allowed almost any metallic compound to be processed, purified and reused as print material.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.description: Five swiftly printed metal polymer arrows with micro-barbed heads, designed to inflict more lethal wounds. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.flavorText: The legality of these projectiles is currently unclear.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.description: 25 arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong Inc. are a wholly owned subsidary of Sinotai.

Meta_Avocado_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Avocado Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.description: An axe geared towards felling trees and chopping lumber
Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Discovering how to mine meteors really changed the game for Inaris

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A solid addition to your belt

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Uniao owns the site of Earth\'s first space elevator

Meta_Axe_Larkwell.description: A well-honed, but less durable axe.
Meta_Axe_Larkwell.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez is an old US-based industrial conglomerate with strong presence in off-world infrastructure.

Meta_Axe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides 90% of printing designs to the ever-expanding AM market.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A single-bit axe with 3D-printed handle and metallic head.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: While the Heike delivers a lot more wood with every strike, this lightweight power comes at the cost of swifter wear and tear.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.description: An efficient, if less than durable harvesting implement.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong Inc. was founded by Sinotai in 2082 CE.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A basic, but respectable felling tool.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: For a single, simple reason, handtools such as this experienced a resurgence as humanity settle worlds other than Earth: reliability.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Axe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Alpha.description: Provides excellent utilities for those who prefer a shotgun to a bow.
Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Alpha.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez have been well known earthside since before Icarus was even discovered.

Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Beta.description: Provides a huge boost to your storage capacity.
Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Beta.flavorText: How many pockets can a backpack have? Larkwell Martinez provide the answer.

Meta_Banana_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Banana Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Bean_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bean Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Berry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Berry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with health and stamina regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals, assists with gathering ore.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_LavaHunter.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with molten magma.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_LavaHunter.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with cave tolerance, and grants additional stone
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist with surviving a wildlife attack.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist gathering infected bark.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Electroshock.description: A set of 25 well engineered, charged bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Electroshock.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Explosive.description: A set of 25 well engineered, explosive bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Explosive.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Piercing.description: A set of 25 well engineered, piercing bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Piercing.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Standard.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Bow_Larkwell.flavorText: For moments when remaining stealth is paramount.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.description: An affordable, reliable and efficient bow with acceptable performance.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong designs are not designed to last, but rather, for ease of repair, being defined by the high degree of interchangeability of parts between their products.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Beta.description: A powerful, if not especially durable recurve design.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: A Shengong knock-off of a classic design.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Bramble_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bramble Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Campfire_Printed.description: A simple, prefabricated campfire for heat, light and cooking, designed to remain lit under all conditions.

Meta_Canteen_Shengong.description: A durable and economic water container.
Meta_Canteen_Shengong.flavorText: Exactly how the Hulu became such an icon of off-world existence is lost in a froth of interplanetary memes.

Meta_Carbon_Arms_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Arms_Alpha.flavorText: Please report any unusal side effects to your local UDA office.

Meta_Carbon_Arms_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Arms_Beta.flavorText: You\'ll find you can lift more with this set.

Meta_Carbon_Chest_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Chest_Alpha.flavorText: Disclaimer: Processed in a factory that also handles radioactive material.

Meta_Carbon_Chest_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.

Meta_Carbon_Feet_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Feet_Alpha.flavorText: Some users may notice a mild tingling sensation when wearing these boots for an extended period.

Meta_Carbon_Feet_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Feet_Beta.flavorText: The toughest boots on the orbital market.

Meta_Carbon_Head_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Head_Alpha.flavorText: One of the many triumphs of human engineering.

Meta_Carbon_Head_Beta.description: The latest technology, designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Head_Beta.flavorText: The perfect companion for any aspiring miner or lumberjack.

Meta_Carbon_Legs_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Legs_Alpha.flavorText: These armor pieces are made of the latest [REDACTED] materials.

Meta_Carbon_Legs_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Legs_Beta.flavorText: Never skip leg day, unless you have these to help.

Meta_Carrot_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Carrot Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Coal_Set.description: A collection of 100 Coal collected from Space. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Coal_Set.flavorText: Retrieved, processed, compressed from stellar leftovers.

Meta_Cocao_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Cocoa Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming.

Meta_Coconut_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coconut Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Coffee_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coffee Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Corn_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Corn Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Cot_Printed.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.

Meta_Crate_Printed.description: A premade crate to store your supplies

Meta_Creature_Scanner.description: Bio-Entity Analysis and Scanning Technology. A handheld device that scans nearby creatures for analysis and locates weaknesses.
Meta_Creature_Scanner.flavorText: A beauty of a device that will make surviving Icarus that much easier.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_A.description: A high powered Crossbow that\'s quick to reload.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.description: The heavy draw on this weapon causes a slower reload, but adds far more damage.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.flavorText: Be careful where you point that thing.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.description: A reliable crossbow to give you an edge in combat.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.flavorText: Hated by bears all over Icarus.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_D.flavorText: This should give you an edge against the wildlife.

Meta_Fiber_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Fiber Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Fishfinder.description: Fish Identification and Scanning Hardware. A handheld device that scans the waterbodies at the present location for fish like creatures.

Meta_Furnace_Printed.description: A premade furnace for all of your basic smelting needs
Meta_Furnace_Printed.flavorText: Basic but gets the job done

Meta_Garlic_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Garlic Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_GreenTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tea Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Hammer_Larkwell.description: A well made, mid-range repair hammer.

Meta_Hammer_Printed.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.description: A highly economic and affordable repair hammer, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong resolve the scarcity of replacement parts in space by ensuring its products share many common parts.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.description: A highly economic and affordable design, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: From hammers to space stations, Shengong Inc makes it all.

Meta_Heated_Canteen_Larkwell.description: An advanced canteen that can be used to heat and store water at your desired temperature.
Meta_Heated_Canteen_Larkwell.flavorText: Because there\'s nothing better than a hot drink in the Arctic.

Meta_Kiwi_Fruit_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Kiwi Fruit Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.description: The perfect knife for hunting and skinning
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Inaris is partly owned by the Uniao alliance

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Brutal, but it gets the job done

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.description: A trusty blade to keep by your side
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Perfect for hurling at your enemies

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Delta.description: The perfect knife to hone your skills with

Meta_Knife_Larkwell.description: A keen blade, honed to perfection.
Meta_Knife_Larkwell.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez is well-known as a manufacturer of hard-hitting weapons.

Meta_Knife_Printed.description: A 3D printed metal hunting knife of no great quality.
Meta_Knife_Printed.flavorText: A staple of metallic AM printing, which has probably made its designer a small fortune in licensing fees.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.description: A heavy, powerful blade, but takes extra energy to use effectively.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: An iconic knife found wherever humanity has spread, the Qie\'s weight makes it a potent, if sometimes punishing weapon.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: \'The knife of the family does not cut.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.description: A strong, if weighty close quarters weapon.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: \'A knife does not recognise its owner.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic but brutal straight-back skinning knife.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: A rough weapon for tough conditions - slice, skin, stab or throw the Sichou, and watch your fingers.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Knife. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Kumara_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Kumara Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Lily_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Lily Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Module_Alpha.description: Enables prospectors near you to carry more weight. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.description: A fast way to view the health of your prey, or your enemies
Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.flavorText: Remember to keep an eye on your own health bar too

Meta_Module_Animal_Highlighting.description: A quicker way to track your prey

Meta_Module_Beta.description: Enables prospectors near you to heal from afflictions faster. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.description: Electro-active device that \'hijacks\' metallic envirosuit fibers to create a \'virtual exoskeleton\' that enhances carry capacity.
Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.flavorText: Electro-active shape-memory fibers are highly flexible under normal conditions, but become rigid when exposed to an electric charge.

Meta_Module_Caving.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in protecting you from threats found in the cave systems of Icarus.
Meta_Module_Caving.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_ColdResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing cold resistance.

Meta_Module_Consumption.description: Micro-doses the user with a high-potency enzyme supplement to reduce food, water and oxygen consumption.
Meta_Module_Consumption.flavorText: "Like terraforming for your body." - Anonymous Group 15 researcher

Meta_Module_ExposureResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing exposure resistance.

Meta_Module_Extremes.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating your temperature in extreme environments.
Meta_Module_Extremes.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Fall_Damage.description: Drastic movement causes a piezoelectric sensor to deliver an electric charge to a small fragment of exotics, briefly reducing mass and diminishing fall damage.

Meta_Module_Fire_Resistance.description: Improves fire resistance by harnessing exotics\' quasi-negative mass to create a nonlinear energy sink.
Meta_Module_Fire_Resistance.flavorText: The sudden abundance of exotic matter produced an immense range of technological innovation in an exceedingly short time, resulting in an era for which the world \'renaissance\' is barely adequate.

Meta_Module_Fishing.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in locating a greater variety of aquatic life in the waterways of Icarus.
Meta_Module_Fishing.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Food.description: A Module for greatly reducing food consumption.

Meta_Module_HeatResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing heat resistance.

Meta_Module_Highlight.description: A Module for highlighting any projectile

Meta_Module_ItemWear.description: A Module for greatly reducing item wear and tear.

Meta_Module_Melee.description: A Module for greatly increasing melee damage, and reducing melee damage taken

Meta_Module_Movement.flavorText: Experiments by Larkwell Martinez into the gravitational effects of exotics have resulted in a prototype known as the \'Dampener\', which slightly lowers local mass, allowing swifter movement.

Meta_Module_Night.description: A Module for greatly increasing night movement speed and reducing food consumption at night

Meta_Module_Oxygen.description: A Module for greatly reducing oxygen consumption.

Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.description: Provides realtime location data on team members.
Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your team members on the map.

Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.description: Releases a steady micro dose of antivenom, enhancing poison resistance.
Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.flavorText: The Detoxifier is classified under UDA regulations as technically qualifying users as a cyborg.

Meta_Module_Radiation.description: Provides some basic Radiation Protection to your Envirosuit.
Meta_Module_Radiation.flavorText: Can be equipped in a module slot.

Meta_Module_StaminaRegen.description: A Module for greatly increasing stamina regeneration.

Meta_Module_TamedDamage.description: A Module for greatly increasing tamed creature damage

Meta_Module_Taming.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with pheromones to encourage the best from your tamed creatures.
Meta_Module_Taming.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Temperature.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating minor temperature fluctuations.
Meta_Module_Temperature.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Water.description: A Module for greatly reducing water consumption.

Meta_Module_WorldBoss.description: Provides realtime location data on World Bosses
Meta_Module_WorldBoss.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your world bosses on the map.

Meta_Module_Wounds.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with extra layers of protection against flesh wounds.
Meta_Module_Wounds.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Mushroom_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Mushroom Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Onion_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Onion Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Oxite_Dissolver_Printed.description: A lightweight dissolver to fill a container with Oxygen.
Meta_Oxite_Dissolver_Printed.flavorText: Breathe fast, breathe easy, thanks to MXC.

Meta_Oxygen_Gel.description: Agrizero\'s patented gel supplement lowers the heart rate, reducing oxygen consumption.
Meta_Oxygen_Gel.flavorText: Largely illegal on Earth, indispensible among the stars.

Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Larkwell.description: An advanced oxygen tank with brand-new filters to improve vigor and air quality planetside.
Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Larkwell.flavorText: A true breath of fresh air.

Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Shengong.flavorText: Named in memory of Yang Liwei.

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Alpha.description: A heavy tool to mine with off-world

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.description: A metal base gives this mining axe great grip
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Mining is where all began for Inaris

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A base model that performs well

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.description: A sturdy pickaxe that gets the job done
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Perfect for mining, or scaring away that pesky wildlife

Meta_Pickaxe_Larkwell.flavorText: One of Larkwell Martinez\'s flagship products.

Meta_Pickaxe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides a vast range of AM designs for a small licensing fee.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A high yield, heavy mining tool from an industrial giant.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Typically for Shengong, the Kuang\'s weight translates to power and improved results, but tends to slow and tire its users.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.description: A robust and hard-bladed alloy steel mining axe.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: A tool to break the soil of many worlds.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A serviceable pickaxe, with an edge for fine metal.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Until it came to seem outdated, Shengong branded itself as \'Armorer to the Solar System\'.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic pickaxe, robust if mass-produced.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: "A pick axe ain\'t never run outta power." - Sol Berlinski

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Pickaxe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Potato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Potato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Power_Source.description: Used to power the IC-001 Extractor. Single use. Cannot be returned to Station.
Meta_Power_Source.flavorText: WARNING: Handle with care, contains unstable material.

Meta_PricklyPear_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Prickly Pear Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Pumpkin_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Pumpkin Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Ration.flavorText: For those with more pressing concerns than what their food actually tastes like, Agrizero\'s MREs provide enduring sustenance.

Meta_Reed_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Reed Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.description: Use to collect 5x Workshop Repair Kits that can repair most Workshop Items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.flavorText: For the clumsy prospector on the go.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Aluminium.description: A collection of 100 Aluminium Ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Aluminium.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Clay.description: A collection of 100 Clay collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Clay.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Copper.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Dirt.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Platinum.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Ruby.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Salt.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Scoria.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.
