Meta_Resource_Pack_Silica.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Stone.description: A collection of 250 Stone collected by another prospector for you.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Stone.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Sulfur.description: A collection of 100 Sulfur collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Sulfur.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Synthetic_Enzymes.description: A collection of 100 Synthetic Enzymes collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Synthetic_Enzymes.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Titanium.description: A collection of 100 Titanium Ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Titanium.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Wood.description: A collection of 250 Wood collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Wood.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Rhubarb_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Rhubarb Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.description: A scanner that can be programmed to locate specific deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.flavorText: The best that money can buy.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_00.description: A sickle designed for reaping as many seeds as possible.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_01.description: A sickle infused with distilled miasmic coating to provide bonuses when harvesting.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_02.description: A sickle which emits heats thanks to its obsidian core.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_03.description: A sickle that is kept frosty due to the research into super cooled ice.

Meta_Sickle_Larkwell.description: A mid-range sickle, perfect for gathering.
Meta_Sickle_Larkwell.flavorText: If it ain\'t broken, why fix it?

Meta_Sickle_Printed.description: A metallic polymer blade, increasing harvesting yield.
Meta_Sickle_Printed.flavorText: MXC is a highly successful collective focused on licensing 3D printing blueprints.

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Alpha.description: Slow your foes with this hunting spear

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Bravo.description: A sturdily built spear with excellent grip

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.description: A well made spear that\'s also lightweight
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Inaris are central players in the off-world mining industry

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.description: A reliable addition to your arsenal
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Keep your weapons by your side, you\'ll never know when you\'ll need them

Meta_Spear_Larkwell.description: A tough and deadly multi-purpose weapon.
Meta_Spear_Larkwell.flavorText: The LM brand has a very enthusiastic user base for its products.

Meta_Spear_Printed.description: A low quality, but perfectly serviceable 3D printed spear.
Meta_Spear_Printed.flavorText: Using techniques pioneered in the early 21st century, additive manufacturing has rendered metal the new plastic.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.description: The Xingxing may not excel in any area, but represents unalloyed adequacy.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: No weapons are more widespread in human space than Shengong\'s.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.description: Doesn\'t need to last a lifetime, to save one.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong\'s designs excel in no particular areas, but as a result have produced many classics of design economy.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.description: A decent spear that knows exactly what it is.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Shengong is a subsidary of Asia\'s space administration, Sinotai. Its operation may be highly beauracratic, but its products are legendary for their efficiency.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Delta.description: A minor miracle of low cost production.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Spear. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Squash_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Squash Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Stamina_Gel.description: A blend of natural ingredients and highly synthetic stimulants that temporarily slows stamina loss.

Meta_Strawberry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Strawberry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_SugarCane_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Sugar Cane Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Super_Ration.description: Protein- and energy- boosted high-density food product.
Meta_Super_Ration.flavorText: Agrizero\'s \'Eat and forget\' campaign never truly hit home, suggesting the food was either immemorable or best wiped from one\'s memory. Regardless, the product provides a huge amount of nutrition in a small space.

Meta_Tomato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tomato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Truffle_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Truffle Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Watermelon_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Watermelon Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Wheat_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Wheat Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_WildTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Gorse Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Yeast_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Yeast Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Metal_Axe.description: An iron axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
Metal_Axe.flavorText: \'Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.\' -- Albert Einstein

Metal_Bed.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bed.
Metal_Bed.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Bolt.description: A hard-hitting iron bolt, trading distance for damage.
Metal_Bolt.flavorText: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.

Metal_Bookshelf.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bookshelf.
Metal_Bookshelf.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Candle.description: A sleek and minimalist metal candlestick.
Metal_Candle.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Dining.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining chair.
Metal_Chair_Dining.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living.description: A sleek and minimalist metal chair.
Metal_Chair_Living.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.description: A sleek and minimalist metal two seater couch.
Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Sitting.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bench.
Metal_Chair_Sitting.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Coffeetable.description: A sleek and minimalist metal coffee table.
Metal_Coffeetable.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Display_Cabinet.description: A sleek and minimalist metal display cabinet.
Metal_Display_Cabinet.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Dresser.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dresser.
Metal_Dresser.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Ladder.description: A sturdy metal ladder for climbing.

Metal_Lamp.description: A sleek and minimalist metal lamp.
Metal_Lamp.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Nightstand.description: A sleek and minimalist metal nightstand.
Metal_Nightstand.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Ore.description: Natural iron ore of high purity, easily smelted.
Metal_Ore.flavorText: Iron ore is plentiful in the planetary crust, as on Earth. Requires the high temperatures of a furnace to refine into pure ingots.

Metal_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A faster and more efficient, biofuel-powered oxidizer with greater storage.

Metal_Pickaxe.description: A strong iron pickaxe, for more rapid, reliable mining of basic stone.
Metal_Pickaxe.flavorText: An enduring if ironic icon of the so-called \'Exotics Rush\'.

Metal_Shelf_Wall.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wall shelf.
Metal_Shelf_Wall.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Sledgehammer.description: Very heavy weapon that can be used to break rocks like Scoria and Obsidian.
Metal_Sledgehammer.flavorText: Can deal a lot of damage

Metal_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Metal_Stool.description: A sleek and minimalist metal stool.
Metal_Stool.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining10.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining table.
Metal_Table_Dining10.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining6.description: A sleek and minimalist metal table.
Metal_Table_Dining6.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Round.description: A sleek and minimalist round metal table.
Metal_Table_Round.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Throwing_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Throwing_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Metal_Wardrobe.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wardrobe.
Metal_Wardrobe.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Milk_Bottle_Glass.description: A glass bottle made for storing milk. Milk will not spoil.
Milk_Bottle_Glass.flavorText: Milk was considered \'food of the gods\' in ancient cultures.

Milk_Bucket.description: A steel pail made for storing milk. Milk will spoil and the Pail will empty when this occurs.

MinerArmor_Arms.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Chest.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Feet.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Head.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Legs.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

Mini_Hippo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a unique creature.
Mini_Hippo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mini_Hippo_Trophy.description: Three mounted Dribbos, mounted for all to see.
Mini_Hippo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mining_Backpack.description: A reinforced backpack that greatly reduces the weight of ore and wood carried.
Mining_Backpack.flavorText: For long-distance hauling and concerted construction pushes, the triple-layer leatherwork and heavy framing greatly reduces burdens.

Mining_Laser.description: A high-energy cutting beam engineered to vaporize rock and expose valuable ore with precision.
Mining_Laser.flavorText: Point, fire, and let physics do the heavy lifting.

Mission_Aerosol_Emitter.description: A device for emitting an aerosol solution.

Mission_Alternator.description: A makeshift alternator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.

Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.description: Broken prototype laser, it could be repaired at a crafting bench.
Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.flavorText: Once a cutting edge prototype, now a pile of scrap.

Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.description: Could be repaired with a bit of patience
Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.flavorText: A lot of simple devices can be repaired on Icarus

Mission_Burner.description: A simple tool for heating solutions.
Mission_Burner.flavorText: Wouldn\'t find a chemistry lab without one of these.

Mission_Communication_Device_T3.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encoded missions.

Mission_Communication_Device_T4.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encrypted missions.

Mission_DNA_Heated_Lysate.description: Heated facilitating in the process of protein denaturation.

Mission_DNA_HomogenizedSample.description: Ground up sample of Garganutan tissue.

Mission_DNA_Lysate.description: The Result of Combining the Mixed Buffer Solution Correctly.

Mission_DNA_TissueSample.description: A Tissue Sample Expertly removed with a Scalpel.

Mission_Device.description: Certified Online Network Transmitter for Contractor Tasking. Allows contact to Orbital station SMPL3 Missions and Operations.
Mission_Device.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Mission_Drone_Navigation.description: A navigation computer core, custom made for a heavy duty drone.
Mission_Drone_Navigation.flavorText: A drone can\'t go anywhere without navigation.

Mission_Drone_Rotor.description: A sturdy rotor which helps generate lift for a heavy duty transport drone.
Mission_Drone_Rotor.flavorText: A drone can\'t go anywhere without lift.

Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Container.description: A container which used to hold stable Enzymes
Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Container.flavorText: Not a trace of enzymes remain.

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit_Craftabl.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Explosive_Crafted.description: An explosive device crafted on Icarus.

Mission_Full_Enzyme_Container.description: A container full of partially digested Enzymes.

Mission_HighTech_1.description: A small, minutely detailed object, extremely light to hold.
Mission_HighTech_1.flavorText: Close attention reveals a faint humming, or perhaps you are imagining it.

Mission_HighTech_2.description: A clearly functional item, with no clear function.
Mission_HighTech_2.flavorText: Something about this device feels immensely old.

Mission_HighTech_3.description: An ornately manufactured device of uncertain materials.
Mission_HighTech_3.flavorText: Wherever this came from, and whoever made it, you are certain you\'ve never seen anything like it before.

Mission_HighTech_Assembled.description: A device of uncertain age, properties and origin.
Mission_HighTech_Assembled.flavorText: Something about this device just feels wrong, though whether it\'s the uncanny weight, the extraordinary intricacy, its arcane purpose, or something else, who can say?

Mission_Incubator.description: A device designed to replicate various atmospheres to allow for optimal egg growth for multiple creatures.
Mission_Incubator.flavorText: Are we seriously hatching creatures now?

Mission_Laser_Part_1.description: The base for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_1.flavorText: An excellent example of sturdy construction

Mission_Laser_Part_2.description: The arm for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_2.flavorText: Keep fingers and toes clear from all moving parts

Mission_Laser_Part_3.description: The laser for a high-powered heating device

Mission_Liquid_Deployment.description: A liquid solution, simple to deploy, just dump on the ground.

Mission_Medical_Device.description: Health Examination & Analysis Lens. Hold to scan prospectors and see their ailments.
Mission_Medical_Device.flavorText: XIGO\'s latest innovation for the furtherment of medical technolgies.

Mission_Monitoring_Pylon.description: A pylon designed for monitoring nearby wildlife.

Mission_Neurotoxic_Aerosol.description: A small canister of an aerosol which will tranquilize any creature in the surrounding area, primed for manual delivery.
Mission_Neurotoxic_Aerosol.flavorText: Can be deadly in the wrong hands.

Mission_Organic_Analyzer.description: A device which will Analyze Organic Samples.

Mission_Prototype_Laser.description: The result of a makeshift repair.

Mission_Radiator.description: A makeshift radiator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.
Mission_Radiator.flavorText: Not a traditional looking radiator but it will do the job.

Mission_Radio.description: Contacts a nearby C0NT4CT Device to kick off Operations on the go. Will not work if there is no C0NT4CT device placed on the map.
Mission_Radio.flavorText: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.description: A device used for monitoring the nearby environment.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.flavorText: A hospitable terraspace was the goal..

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.description: A control system for an environmental monitoring device.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.flavorText: Some circuitry, a little tape, good as new.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.description: A catalyst to stabilize volatile materials.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.flavorText: Making it a little safer to handle certain raw materials.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Containment.flavorText: Preventing mortal injury to prospectors is good for the bottom line.

Mission_Ship_Gyro.flavorText: This is just what this ship needs to get back home.

Mission_Ship_Gyro_Broken.description: This instrument has been damaged almost beyond repair.
Mission_Ship_Gyro_Broken.flavorText: What could have broken this so badly?

Mission_Ship_Navigation.description: A Navigation Module for a Ship held together with materials found on planet.

Mission_Ship_Navigation_Part.description: A few electrical parts with frayed wires.
Mission_Ship_Navigation_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Mission_Ship_Thruster.description: A quickly repaired basic thruster made from on materials found on planet.
Mission_Ship_Thruster.flavorText: How did this work to begin with?

Mission_Ship_Thruster_Part.description: The remains of what was a Ship Thruster.
Mission_Ship_Thruster_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.description: An experimental device for projecting densely clustered micro-shockwaves in a gas medium.
Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.flavorText: A product of collaborative research between Group 15 and one of Larkwell Martinez\'s non-lethal weapons research units.

Mission_Stasis_Bag.description: A bag inlaid with technology that puts the user into a chemical stasis for later treatment.
Mission_Stasis_Bag.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Vesper_Cage.description: Can trap small creatures such as Vespers.

Mixed_Berries.description: A tasty combination of berries to keep you going.
Mixed_Berries.flavorText: Another great meal from your Cooking Station.

Moa_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Moa.
Moa_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Moa_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Molotov.description: A glass bottle that will explode on impact, leaving behind a small fire.
Molotov.flavorText: Forest fires never started so easily.

Mushroom.description: A nutritious fungus, can be eaten raw, but best fried.
Mushroom.flavorText: The full implications of introducing fungi to a new world are yet to be seen.

Mushroom_Omlette.description: Fried egg with a generous helping of mushrooms.

Nailgun.description: Fires Nails to Repair Buildings from a Distance

National_Flag.description: A Flag Pole with flag, made to withstand harsh conditions.

Natural_Oil_Refiner.description: A thermal refining unit engineered to distill biofuel into cleaner, high-efficiency oil.
Natural_Oil_Refiner.flavorText: Crude in, refined out, simple, if you ignore everything in between.

Needler_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Needler.
Needler_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Needler_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Nesting_Box.description: Place an egg into this nest to hatch a chicken egg. Hatching speed will increase if a chicken sits on the egg.

Obsidian.description: Glass formed from the belly of the earth, as chunks of solid lava.
Obsidian.flavorText: Very popular for use in both weapons and jewellery.

Obsidian_Arms.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Arms.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Arrow.description: A lightweight arrow created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Arrow.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Axe.description: A lightweight Axe created with a sharpened head of Obsidian. Gives a chance to collect coal from trees.
Obsidian_Axe.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Bolt.description: A lightweight bolt created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Bolt.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Chest.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Chest.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Feet.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Feet.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Head.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Head.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Knife.description: A lightweight knife created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance for food to be instantly cooked when skinning.
Obsidian_Knife.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Legs.description: A durable piece of armor that provides a fair level of resistance against fire and heat.
Obsidian_Legs.flavorText: Proof that anything can be salvaged for use on Icarus.

Obsidian_Pickaxe.description: A lightweight Pickaxe created with a sharpened point of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.
Obsidian_Pickaxe.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Sickle.description: A lightweight sickle created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance to cook veges when harvesting but may also produce spoiled plants.
Obsidian_Sickle.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Sledgehammer.description: A lightweight hammer created with a blunted block of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.
Obsidian_Sledgehammer.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Spear.description: A lightweight spear created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Spear.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Throwing_Knife.description: A lightweight throwing knife created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Obsidian_Throwing_Spear.description: An aerodynamic spear created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.
Obsidian_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.

Oil_Barrel.description: A reinforced steel container designed for storing and transporting oil.

Oil_Can.flavorText: Lightweight alternative at the cost of resource amount.

Oil_Can_Meta.description: A makeshift oil canister, that can hold Refined Oil, comes pre-filled.
Oil_Can_Meta.flavorText: The cap\'s a bit loose, still sealed, but that\'s fine right?

Oil_Power_Generator.description: A combustion-driven generator that converts crude oil into reliable electrical output.
Oil_Power_Generator.flavorText: Feed it fuel and it\'ll keep your entire outpost alive.

Onion.description: A versatile vegetable that enhances the flavour of most dishes.
Onion.flavorText: Every layer hides another reason to cry.

Onion_Rings.description: Crispy fried rings that make for a comforting snack.
Onion_Rings.flavorText: Proof that frying makes everything better.

Onion_Souffle.description: A delicate dish with a surprisingly savoury kick.
Onion_Souffle.flavorText: Light as air, don\'t let it collapse.

Organic_Extractor.description: A processing unit that breaks down organic matter (foods/plants) into high-grade Biofuel for field deployment.
Organic_Extractor.flavorText: Turns yesterday\'s scraps into tomorrow\'s power.

Organic_Resin.description: A natural and highly flexible bonding agent.

Orka_Arctic_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Orka_Arctic_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Orka_Arctic_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Oxite.description: Can be refined into breathable oxygen.
Oxite.flavorText: A stable water-oxygen matrix, oxite slowly decomposes when exposed to the atmosphere of Icarus.

Oxygen_Bladder.description: A simple airtight vessel for storing extra oxygen.

Oxygen_Tank.description: A small tank for storing and consuming oxygen.
Oxygen_Tank.flavorText: While plants and animals were genetically adjusted to deal with the impurities in Icarus\'s air, humans need to bring their own.

Packed_Fuel_Brick.description: Compressed Fur mixed with Tree Sap to create a longer lasting fuel.

Painting_Dark.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a charcoal frame.
Painting_Dark.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Gold.description: A large painting on canvas with a golden frame.
Painting_Gold.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Gold_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a gold leaf frame.
Painting_Gold_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Metal.description: A portrait painting on canvas with an iron frame.
Painting_Metal.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Scroll.description: A portrait painting on canvas held in a scroll.
Painting_Scroll.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a wooden frame.
Painting_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Paints.description: Paints lovingly crafted for Portrait Painting

Pastry.description: A simple but satisfying shortcrust pastry.
Pastry.flavorText: \'Icarus was only truly colonized when we began making pastry on that planet\' - Jacques Merrida

Pavlova.description: A light, fluffy and tasty dessert.

Pickaxe_Attachment_BauxiteYield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of aluminum.
Pickaxe_Attachment_BauxiteYield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_BauxiteYield_2.description: An attachment that increases the yield of aluminum.
Pickaxe_Attachment_BauxiteYield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_MiningRadius_1.description: An attachment that increases the mining radius of a pickaxe.
Pickaxe_Attachment_MiningRadius_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_MiningRadius_2.description: An attachment that increases the mining radius of a pickaxe.
Pickaxe_Attachment_MiningRadius_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickled_Avocado.description: Avocado that has been marinated resulting in a tangy and slightly sour flavor.
Pickled_Avocado.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Pickled_Eggs.description: Boiled Eggs preseved in a pickling solution, to be consumed at a later date.

Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A tangy dish made by preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish in a flavorful mixture.
Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Not for everyone, but a delicious long lasting treat for those that enjoy it.

Pig_Head.description: A preserved memory of a snouted friend.
Pig_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Piglet_Head.description: A preserved memory of a little pig.
Piglet_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Piglet_Trophy.description: The mounted remains for a creature preserved forever.
Piglet_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Piranha_Statue_Wood.description: One of the fish of Icarus carved out of wood.

Pistol_Attachment_Accuracy_1.description: An attachment that increases accuracy for Pistols.
Pistol_Attachment_Accuracy_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Pistol at an Alteration Bench.

Pistol_Attachment_Accuracy_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases accuracy for Pistols.
Pistol_Attachment_Accuracy_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Pistol at an Alteration Bench.

Pistol_CHAC.description: A modern pistol made in the classic 3D printed CHAC style.
Pistol_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Pistol_T3.description: A weapon with decent bang for your buck.

Pistol_T4.description: A pistol that utilizes the best planetside tech available.

Plant_Extract.description: Plant DNA that has been tainted by the terraformed atmosphere of Icarus.

Plastics.description: Mouldable panels for use for containers, shells, casings and housings.

Platinium_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides slight storm resistance to your crops.
Platinium_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Platinum_Axe.description: An axceedingly reliable, accurate hewing tool.
Platinum_Axe.flavorText: "Give me six hours to chop down a tree, I\'ll spend the first four sharpening the axe" - A. Lincoln

Platinum_Bolt.flavorText: Though eclipsed by exotics, platinum remains extremely valuable, even if the market is somewhat distant.

Platinum_Crossbow.description: A crossbow that automatically reloads for rapid fire.
Platinum_Crossbow.flavorText: It\'s time for some serious damage.

Platinum_Hammer.description: Light, durable, accurate, but still a hammer.
Platinum_Hammer.flavorText: "On Icarus, you\'re either the hammer, or the anvil" - Javier Survez

Platinum_Ingot.description: An inert and corrosion-resistant metal, perfect for electronics.
Platinum_Ingot.flavorText: Enough platinum to found a small kingdom, were you on Earth.

Platinum_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Ore.description: As rare on Icarus as on Earth.
Platinum_Ore.flavorText: One of the least reactive metals in the universe, platinum requires extremely high temperatures for smelting and refinement.

Platinum_Pickaxe.flavorText: There is a small, but specific class of problems for which the only solution is a pickaxe.

Platinum_Shealth.description: A small sheath of platinum which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery.

Platinum_Sickle.description: An extremely precise, high yield harvesting tool.
Platinum_Sickle.flavorText: A proletariat icon made from a near-priceless material, yet no more valuable than lead when compared to exotics themselves.

Platinum_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. An advanced survival tool on Icarus.
Platinum_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Throwing_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Throwing_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. A projectile on Icarus.
Platinum_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Weave.description: Platinum strands interwoven with a fiber based fabric.

Plough_Platinum.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create medium quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Steel.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Titanium.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create high quality mounds when seeding.

Poison_Arrow.flavorText: Requiring less accuracy, but more patience, the poison arrow brings down quarry slowly, but surely.

Poison_Paste.description: A slow-working toxin made from spoiled meat.
Poison_Paste.flavorText: \'Life is a slow working poison\' - Jean Hurvit

Poison_Sack.description: A slightly squishy organ harvested from native creatures

Poison_Sack_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from an intact poison sac.
Poison_Sack_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Poisoned_Bait.flavorText: Keep away from pets and children.

PolarBear_Armor_Head.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

PolarBear_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Polar Bear.
PolarBear_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

PolarBear_Trophy.flavorText: Greater challenges await beyond the terrazone, but here, there is no greater emblem of your eminence.

Polarbear_Arms.description: Tough and lightweight fur gloves offering extreme protection against low temperatures.
Polarbear_Arms.flavorText: Skinning polar bears has been illegal to everyone except Inuit hunters for centuries on Earth. On Icarus, there is no such prohibition.

Polarbear_Chest.description: Strong, lightweight body armor with extreme protection against cold.
Polarbear_Chest.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Feet.description: Highly insulated, lightweight protective fur boots.
Polarbear_Feet.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Head_Armor_Yeti.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar Frostfoot is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Legs.description: Lightweight fur armor for the lower body, offering exceptional insulation.
Polarbear_Legs.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Pelt.description: A fur hide from the largest known carnivore on two planets.
Polarbear_Pelt.flavorText: An unparalleled hunter, able to smell its prey from over a mile away, the polar bear has only one natural enemy: you.

Polymerizer.description: A chemical processing unit that bonds refined materials into high-strength synthetic polymers.
Polymerizer.flavorText: Takes simple molecules and bullies them into something useful.

Portable_Beacon.description: Displays a map marker when deployed. Prospectors can adjust the map markers icon and colour by interacting with it.
Portable_Beacon.flavorText: Absorbs the smallest amount of light from any atmosphere and stores it in a small internal battery that can last for hundreds of years with minimal charge. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

Portable_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Portable_Generator.flavorText: For the prospector on the go.

Portable_Tank_Biofuel.description: Useful for hauling biofuel long distances.
Portable_Tank_Biofuel.flavorText: Carrying a large container full of explosive liquid, what could go wrong?

Portable_Tank_Water.description: Useful for hauling water long distances. Can be connected to water networks.

PotBellyStove.description: A wrought iron stove for cooking basic meals.
PotBellyStove.flavorText: Hearty and filling, the warm meals provided by this stove are the next steps towards culinary perfection.

Potato.description: A starchy tuber that makes up the base of many meals.
Potato.flavorText: Mash them, boil them, you can even put them in a stew.

Pouch_Generic.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Blue.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Blue.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Green.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Green.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Red.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Red.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Powerbank.description: For Portable Electrical Storage and charging of handheld devices. Can be used to charge items in your inventory with a right click.
Powerbank.flavorText: First for cellphones - now for tools.

PricklyPear.description: A cactus fruit with vibrant colour and mild sweetness.

PricklyPear_Jelly.description: A sweet treat made from cactus fruit pulp.
PricklyPear_Jelly.flavorText: Proof that even cacti can be comforting.

PricklyPear_Margarita.description: A refreshing beverage with a tart twist.

PricklyPear_Muffins.description: Moist, fruity muffins baked with delightful flavours.
PricklyPear_Muffins.flavorText: Soft, sweet, and far safer than picking the fruit.

Pronghorn_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Pronghorn.
Pronghorn_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Pronghorn_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Prop_Centrifuge.description: A device that spins samples at high speeds to separate substances based on their density

Prop_Microscope.description: A device that can be used to examine small samples.

Prop_Mining_Cart.description: An old mining cart which was used to transport ore.

Prop_Moisture_Analyzer.description: A machine used to determine the moisture levels in samples.

Prop_Scales.description: A device that can be used to measure weight.

Prop_Stirrer.description: A device used to thoroughly mix compounds via stirring.

Prop_Surgical_Equipment.description: A set of sterilized surgical equipment used for operations or experimentation.

Pump_Jack.description: A powered extraction rig engineered to draw deep oil reserves to the surface for processing.
Pump_Jack.flavorText: It works as long as nothing goes wrong, which is asking a lot on Icarus.

Pumpkin.flavorText: Ensuring that Halloween becomes a multi-planet holiday. Best cooked.

Pumpkin_Pie.description: A spiced dessert baked with a golden crust.
Pumpkin_Pie.flavorText: A slice of comfort in every bite.

Purification_Pill.description: Will remove the risk of Dysentery from Tainted / Rain water. Removes any flavour effects.\r\n\r\nTo use, Craft the \'Cool Water\' recipe on your character with this tablet and a non-pure water source in your inventory.

Pygmy_Lop_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pyritic_Crust_Bauxite.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Aluminium Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Bauxite.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Clay.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Clay. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Clay.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Coal.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Coal. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.

Pyritic_Crust_Purple_Exotic.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Red_Exotic.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Volatile Raw Exotics. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Red_Exotic.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Ruby.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Coal. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Ruby.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Salt.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Salt. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Salt.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.
