Pyritic_Crust_Scoria.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Silicon.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Silica. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Silicon.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Stone.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Stone. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Stone.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Sulfur.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Sulfur. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Sulfur.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Titanium.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Titanium Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Titanium.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Quailty_Fertilizer.description: Promotes recovery of Crop Quality while the Crop is Wet.

Rabbit_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Rabbit.
Rabbit_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rabbit_Statue_Stone.description: Some rough stone carved into the shape of one of Icarus\' smallest creatures.
Rabbit_Statue_Stone.flavorText: The closest thing to a pet, for now.

Rabbit_Statue_Wood.description: A very rough carving of a rabbit.
Rabbit_Statue_Wood.flavorText: Looks similar to something made in shop class.

Rabbit_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rabbit_Variant_Snow_Head.description: A preserved memory of a cute bunny.
Rabbit_Variant_Snow_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rabbit_Variant_Snow_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Snow Pygmy Lop.
Rabbit_Variant_Snow_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rabbit_Varient_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Pygmy Lop.
Rabbit_Varient_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Radar_Biofuel.description: A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Biofuel. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.
Radar_Biofuel.flavorText: Powered by good old Icarus Biofuel.

Radar_Electric.description: A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Electricity. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.
Radar_Electric.flavorText: Connect this baby up to a generator and you are good to go.

Radar_Meta.description: Portable Exotics detection unit, uses an internal power system that attracts a large amount of wildlife when active. Approximate directional arc shown on your map.

Radiation_Protection_Armor_Arms.description: Adapted from HazMat exosuits, this configuration keeps you mobile while minimizing exposure.
Radiation_Protection_Armor_Arms.flavorText: Because radiation\'s not the only thing trying to kill you

Radiation_Protection_Armor_Chest.description: Adapted from HazMat exosuits, this configuration keeps you mobile while minimizing exposure.
Radiation_Protection_Armor_Chest.flavorText: Because radiation\'s not the only thing trying to kill you

Radiation_Protection_Armor_Feet.description: Adapted from HazMat exosuits, this configuration keeps you mobile while minimizing exposure.
Radiation_Protection_Armor_Feet.flavorText: Because radiation\'s not the only thing trying to kill you

Radiation_Protection_Armor_Head.description: Adapted from HazMat exosuits, this configuration keeps you mobile while minimizing exposure.
Radiation_Protection_Armor_Head.flavorText: Because radiation\'s not the only thing trying to kill you

Radiation_Protection_Armor_Legs.description: Adapted from HazMat exosuits, this configuration keeps you mobile while minimizing exposure.
Radiation_Protection_Armor_Legs.flavorText: Because radiation\'s not the only thing trying to kill you

Radiation_Tracker.description: A device which can track down active uranium nodes for collection.
Radiation_Tracker.flavorText: An essential tool for collecting uranium.

Rain_Reservoir.description: A simple and durable way to collect rain water.
Rain_Reservoir.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

Rain_Reservoir_T3.description: Can collect rain water and be connected to a network to fill up other devices.
Rain_Reservoir_T3.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

Ram_Head.description: The remains of a majestic Ram.

Ram_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_1.description: An attachment that increases your aiming speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, rifle, shotgun, bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your aiming speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, rifle, shotgun, bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Additional_Proj.description: An attachment that increases your chance to fire two bolts at once.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Additional_Proj.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.description: An attachment that greatly increases the speed of projectiles.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Animal_Highligh.description: An attachment that highlights your target when aiming.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Animal_Highligh.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_1.description: An attachment that increases both projectile and critical damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases both projectile and critical damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.description: An attachment that reduces the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_1.description: An attachment that increases the durability of your weapon.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_2.description: An attachment that increases the durability of your weapon.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Extended_Mag.description: An attachment that increases your ammo capacity and reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Extended_Mag.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Increased_Sprea.description: An attachment that increases the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Increased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_1.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming, and the amount you can carry.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_2.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming, and the amount you can carry.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Rapid_Fire.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles and your reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Rapid_Fire.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_1.description: An attachment that allows you a closer view of your target, and increases damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_2.description: An attachment that allows you an even closer view of your target, and greatly increases damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_1.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming and your reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_2.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming and your reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_1.description: An attachment that increases your damage while stealthed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your damage while stealthed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_1.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles and uses less stamina.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the speed of projectiles and uses less stamina.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Raptor_Desert_Head.description: A preserved memory of a ferocious beast.
Raptor_Desert_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Raptor_Desert_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Raptor_Head.description: A preserved memory of a ferocious beast.
Raptor_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Raptor_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Raw_Chicken.description: Raw Chicken meat harvested from a once cryogenically frozen chicken.

Raw_Fish.description: Will nourish, but better if cooked.
Raw_Fish.flavorText: Salmon and trout required only slight genetic adjustment to thrive in the waterways of Icarus.

Raw_Iron_Wood.description: A delicate substance often found coating creatures that inhabit swampy areas of Icarus.
Raw_Iron_Wood.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

Raw_Meat.description: Meat from a recently killed animal, worth cooking first.
Raw_Meat.flavorText: Transplanted from Earth, a range of genetically modified animals thrive in the terrazone, providing an energy-dense food source.

Raw_Wood_Lamp.description: A charming lamp that emits a cozy glow.

Raw_Wood_Sign.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Raw_Wood_Sign_Trunk_A.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Raw_Wood_Sign_Trunk_B.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Reaver_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Reaver.
Reaver_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Reaver_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Recovery_Beacon_Tracker.description: Emergency Coordination for High-value Objects. Will detect and scan for emergency beacons in the nearby area.

Recurve_Bow.description: With higher energy, recurve bows increase range and power.
Recurve_Bow.flavorText: Originating in ancient Scythia, the recurve bow stores energy more efficiently than a conventional bow, allowing for smaller, more compact weapons with an appreciable improvement in range and stopping power.

Redback_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Redback.
Redback_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Redback_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Reed_Flower.description: A wildflower reputed to have medicinal properties.
Reed_Flower.flavorText: Transplanting this reed to alien soil has altered its bioactive properties considerably.

Reed_Flower_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted out of flowers, to attract more fish.
Reed_Flower_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Refined_Copper.description: A pure ingot of copper, humanity\'s first metal.
Refined_Copper.flavorText: Easily worked, readily alloyed, a highly useful material for everything from weaponry to basic electronics.

Refined_Gold.flavorText: The existence of exotics on Icarus has demoted gold to the status of a useful, shiny metal.

Refined_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Refined_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Refined_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Refined_Iron_Wood.description: A distilled essence of the Miasma that can be found on creatures in heavily exotic-affected areas.
Refined_Iron_Wood.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

Refined_Metal.flavorText: Iron may corode, but its ease of production makes it an ideal material on Icarus.

Refined_Wood_Fishing_Rod.description: A lightweight and reliable fishing rod.

Refined_Wood_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of wood, to attract more fish.
Refined_Wood_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

ReinforcedWood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
ReinforcedWood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

ReinforcedWood_Floor.description: Rugged timber flooring, treated with a coating of beeswax for reinforcement.

ReinforcedWood_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
ReinforcedWood_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

ReinforcedWood_Ramp.description: A basic wooden ramp or roof, coated in beeswax to protect it from the elements.
ReinforcedWood_Ramp.flavorText: May still be susceptable to the great storms of Icarus.

ReinforcedWood_Roof_Corner.description: A roughly cut and coated insert for angled roofs.

ReinforcedWood_Wall.description: A wall of treated wooden logging.

ReinforcedWood_Wall_Angle.description: Treated angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Reinforced_Door.description: A heavy wooden door reinforced with iron bracing.
Reinforced_Door.flavorText: Once your structure has a doorway, this heavy door can be attached.

Reinforced_TrapDoor.description: A braced and bolstered wooden trapdoor.
Reinforced_TrapDoor.flavorText: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

Reinforced_Window.description: A braced and bolstered wooden window.

Ren.description: The main currency used by the UDA. Prospectors take on contracts to Earn this so they can purchase and upgrade gear. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.

Repair_Bench.description: Repairs any item, requiring power to repair Tier 4, Tier 5, and Workshop items.
Repair_Bench.flavorText: A little duct tape, maybe some lubricant, this bench can fix anything!

ResearchEquipment_Centrifuge.flavorText: Still functional but has seen better days.

ResearchEquipment_Flasks.flavorText: A simple device, still running after many hours of research.

ResearchEquipment_LabDesk.description: A simple Laboratory Desk brought from Orbit.
ResearchEquipment_LabDesk.flavorText: Easier to craft on Icarus these days.

ResearchEquipment_Microscope.flavorText: Expensive to replace on Earth, even more expensive on Icarus.

ResearchEquipment_TestTubes.flavorText: Collected many samples during their time.

Resistance_Fertilizer.description: Helps a Crop maintain its quality during storms.

ResourceStack_Stone.flavorText: A time honored solution for storing rubble, stone and debris.

Rhubarb.description: A tart and tangy vegetable with large green leaves and pink or red stalks.
Rhubarb.flavorText: Rhubarb is a good source of vitamins C and K.

Rhubarb_Stew.flavorText: Another great meal from your Potbelly Stove.

Rifle_Assault.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents.

Rifle_Assault_T4.description: An automatic firearm that fires mid caliber rounds. Works with Rifle Attachments and Talents.

Rifle_Attachment_Accuracy_1.description: An attachment that increases accuracy for Rifles.
Rifle_Attachment_Accuracy_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Rifle at an Alteration Bench.

Rifle_Attachment_Accuracy_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases accuracy for Rifles.
Rifle_Attachment_Accuracy_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid Rifle at an Alteration Bench.

Rifle_BoltAction.description: A single-shot bolt action, packs a punch.
Rifle_BoltAction.flavorText: Despite limited metallurgic and gunsmithing resources, First Cohort prospectors have managed to design a better-than-serviceable, true-aiming hunting rifle.

Rifle_CHAC.description: A modern hunting rifle with fairly quick reloads that deals a decent amount of damage.
Rifle_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Rifle_Hunting.description: A powerful rifle, ideal for big game hunting.
Rifle_Hunting.flavorText: An ancient hand-wrought weapon design, adapted to a new frontier.

Roast_Chicken.description: A slow roasted chicken, smells delicious.
Roast_Chicken.flavorText: Just like mama used to make.

Roat_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Roat.
Roat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Roat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rock_Golem_Attachment.description: An attachment that grants damage reduction and health regen.
Rock_Golem_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Rock_Golem_Chair.description: Evidence that a Quarrite was bested.
Rock_Golem_Chair.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Rock_Golem_Core.description: A piece of matter taken from the body of a great beast.

Rock_Golem_Fragment.description: A piece of matter taken from the body of a great beast.

Rock_Golem_Grenade.description: Explodes into many sharp objects that damage and slow.
Rock_Golem_Grenade.flavorText: Like those little colored toy building blocks, but much much older.

Rock_Golem_Gun.description: A Pneumatic Gun crafted from Quarrite materials. Launches stones which shatter on impact.
Rock_Golem_Gun.flavorText: You\'ve heard of fighting fire with fire...

Rock_Golem_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Coal.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Coal.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Copper.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Copper.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Exotic.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Exotic.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Gold.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Gold.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Iron.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Iron.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Oxite.description: A large chunk of Quarrite Armor. Can be Converted into Raw Ore in a Bio-Cleaner or Organic Residue Cleanser.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Armor_Oxite.flavorText: How did the Quarrite Even Grow This?

Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Rock_Golem_Juvenile_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rock_Golem_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Quarrite Creature.

Rock_Golem_Sledgehammer.description: A Sledgehammer crafted from the spoils of victory against a Quarrite.
Rock_Golem_Sledgehammer.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Rock_Golem_Trophy.description: A preserved specimen from a Quarrite that once lived on Icarus.
Rock_Golem_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rock_Golem_Trophy_Lamp.description: A monument to a great creature, which emits a small red light. Has 3 variations.
Rock_Golem_Trophy_Lamp.flavorText: What a great use for the core of a ferocious beast.

Rooster_Head.description: What remains of a feathered friend.
Rooster_Head.flavorText: No longer will this wake up nearby prospectors at 5am.

Rooster_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rope.description: Remains one of humanity\'s greatest inventions.
Rope.flavorText: A central element in crafting various construction materials and equipment.

Rotten_Meat_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from... rotten meat.
Rotten_Meat_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Rubber_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of rubber, to attract more fish.
Rubber_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Ruby_Ore.description: The key ingredient for storing and amplifying light used in laser based equipment.

Ruby_Shaped.description: A Ruby Lens that has been shaped to facilitate the amplification of light for laser based technologies.

Rug_Bear.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Buffalo.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Conifer_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Cougar.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Deer.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Desert_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Jaguar.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_PolarBear.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_SnowLeopard.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Snow_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_Weave_Thick.description: A plainly woven, thick pile fiber mat.

Rug_Weave_Thin.flavorText: Four trillion kilometers from home, these details can make all the difference.

Rustic_Bed.description: An extra sturdy and comfortable bed.

Rustic_Bench.description: A rudimentary bench from which to watch the world go by.

Rustic_Bookshelf.description: A handmade bookshelf for more storage in your home.

Rustic_Cabinet.description: A simple cabinet for all of your collections.
Rustic_Cabinet.flavorText: Reducing clutter, one knicknack at a time.

Rustic_Candles.description: A cluster of candles, with four variations.

Rustic_CoffeeTable.description: A simple coffee table for your home.
Rustic_CoffeeTable.flavorText: Don\'t put a ring on it!

Rustic_CouchLarge.description: A large and cozy couch to share.
Rustic_CouchLarge.flavorText: Or to keep all for yourself.

Rustic_CouchMedium.flavorText: It could also just be a really big armchair.

Rustic_Decoration_Bench.description: A bench for crafting decorations from a range of tech levels.
Rustic_Decoration_Bench.flavorText: Pick up a new hobby, today!

Rustic_DiningChair.description: A basic dining chair for your home.

Rustic_Dresser.description: A simple dresser for all your bedroom needs.
Rustic_Dresser.flavorText: Would probably be worth a pretty penny back home.

Rustic_LivingChair.description: A comfortable armchair to relax in.
Rustic_LivingChair.flavorText: The perfect thing after a hard day of prospecting.

Rustic_NightStand.description: A basic nightstand to accompany your bed.
Rustic_NightStand.flavorText: There\'s nothing better than a complete set.

Rustic_Pot.description: A simple pot to decorate your home.

Rustic_Statue.description: A statue commemorating the discovery of Icarus with two variations.

Rustic_Stool.flavorText: Perfect for reaching those higher shelves.

Rustic_TableLarge.flavorText: For when you want to throw a planetside dinner party.

Rustic_TableRound.flavorText: Perfect for planning a mission around.

Rustic_Wardrobe.description: An expansive wardrobe with three variations.
Rustic_Wardrobe.flavorText: The history of the wardrobe goes all the way back to the Romans.

Rustic_WardrobeNarrow.description: A narrower wardrobe for smaller homes, with two variations.
Rustic_WardrobeNarrow.flavorText: A smaller version but useful nonetheless.

Rustic_Wood_Shelf.flavorText: A shelf made of wood, your parents will be proud.

Saddle_Advanced_Arctic.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Advanced_Arctic.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Saddle_Armored.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount that is remnant of medieval knights.
Saddle_Armored.flavorText: Feel like a knight riding into battle.

Saddle_Basic_Arctic.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Basic_Arctic.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Saddle_Basic_Desert.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Basic_Desert.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Saddle_BearHide.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from the hide of those pesky Bears.

Saddle_Carrier.description: An exclusive saddle for the Buffalo, Tusker, Terrenus and Horse.

Saddle_Cart.description: Place this cart inside a tamed Buffalo, Tusker, or Bull\'s inventory to greatly increase its carrying capacity.
Saddle_Cart.flavorText: Lending a helping hand, or hoof.

Saddle_Cart_Harvest.description: A cart when pulled by a Buffalo, Tusker, or Bull, will attempt to harvest fully grown nearby plants.

Saddle_Cart_Plough.description: A cart which when stocked with seeds, dirt, and pulled by a Buffalo, Tusker, or Bull, will create mounds with planted seeds.

Saddle_Cart_Water.description: A cart which when stocked with water and pulled by a Buffalo, Tusker, or Bull, will water nearby crops.

Saddle_CrocSkin.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from fine Crocodile skin.

Saddle_DeluxeLeather.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from supple leather.

Saddle_Desert.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount for the harsh Desert conditions.

Saddle_Explorer.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount that is designed for Arctic environments.

Saddle_Mammoth_Standard.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable

Saddle_Overrider.description: An exclusive saddle for the Moa and Ubis.

Saddle_QuickTamer.description: Drastically increases the taming speed of nearby creatures.

Saddle_Racing.description: A slim sleek saddle that allows the mount to move uninhibited.

Saddle_Raptor.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Raptor.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Saddle_Sandworm.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from luxurious Sandworm skin.

Saddle_Standard.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Standard.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Saddle_Standard_Bag.description: Place this harness inside a tamed Buffalo or Tusker\'s inventory to increase it\'s carrying capacity. This harness cannot be used as a seat by players.
Saddle_Standard_Bag.flavorText: Lending a helping hand, or hoof.

Salt.description: A small pile of Salt, can be used on a salting station to preserve food.
Salt.flavorText: An essential mineral for adding flavour and preserving food.

Salted_Caramel_Pastry.description: An intricately baked pastry, filled with caramel and topped with salt.

Salting_Station.description: Can be used to preserve food, using salt.

Saltwater_Fillet_Sashimi.description: A delicacy consisting of raw, thinly sliced saltwater fish.
Saltwater_Fillet_Sashimi.flavorText: Can be made at a Cooking Station. Simple, but delicious.

Saltwater_Fish_Fillet.description: A neatly trimmed fillet ready for cooking.

Sand.description: Clear Icarus Sand extracted from the ground with a shovel.
Sand.flavorText: I hear sand can be used to make glass.

SandArmor_Arms.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Backpack.description: A powered backpack that emits an aura of fall damage reduction and is made to help protect against exposure. Can be recharged at the Charging Station.

SandArmor_Chest.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Feet.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Head.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.
SandArmor_Head.flavorText: Designed on Old Earth to Survive in Extreme Desert Conditions.

SandArmor_Legs.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

Sandscuttle_Head.description: What remains of a roach-like creature.
Sandscuttle_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Sandscuttle_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Scuttler.
Sandscuttle_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Sandworm_Arrow.flavorText: While the sandworm\'s existence inside the terrazone is a mystery, its scales make extraordinarily practical blades.

Sandworm_Attachment_Armor.description: An attachment that improves physical resistance but lowers fire resistance.
Sandworm_Attachment_Armor.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Sandworm_Beam.description: A beam that provides rustic style and function.
Sandworm_Beam.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Bow.description: A bow fashioned from the stronger scales of a Sandworm.

Sandworm_Floor.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.
Sandworm_Halfpiece.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Sandworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Sandworm_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the sandworm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Sandworm_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Sandworm Creature.

Sandworm_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Sandworm_Ramp.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Scale.flavorText: When held in the hand, fresh from the worm\'s body, the scale gently vibrated. Slowly, this motion drained away, leaving only a flake of light, hugely strong armor.

Sandworm_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Sandworm_Spear.flavorText: Group 15 continues to research sandworms, suspecting its subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Sandworm_Tendon.description: A tendon taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Sandworm_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the sandworm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Sandworm_Throwing_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Sandworm_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Group 15 continues to research sandworms, suspecting its subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Sandworm_Trophy.description: A complete sandworm, suspended for all to see.
Sandworm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier.description: A Sandworm head that has been skillfully turned into a brazier.
Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier.flavorText: Really adds that finishing touch to your cozy outdoor area.

Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier_Large.description: A complete Sandworm that has been skillfully turned into a brazier.
Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier_Large.flavorText: Really adds that finishing touch to your cozy outdoor area.

Sandworm_Trophy_Head.flavorText: Which room will you put this in?

Sandworm_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Sandworm_Wall.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandwyrm_Backpack.description: Heavy-duty pack crafted from cured hide. Highly resistant to heat, abrasion, and the general wear of desert survival.
Sandwyrm_Backpack.flavorText: Still smells like the desert, but it\'s tougher than you are.

Sandwyrm_Bow.description: A high-tension recurve bow made from organic composites.
Sandwyrm_Bow.flavorText: Float like a Queen, hit like a Truck.

Sandwyrm_Egg.description: A calcified gestation pod taken from a (likely very angry) Sandwyrm Queen.
Sandwyrm_Egg.flavorText: I\'d run away fast with that, if I were you.

Sandwyrm_Lantern.description: Uses bioluminescent bile for low-heat lighting. A reliable fallback for when your battery inevitably fails in the dunes.

Sandwyrm_Lure.description: A lure created from the spoils of a fight against a Queen.

Sandwyrm_Queen_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Sandwyrm_Queen_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Sandwyrm_Target.description: A training dummy made out of Sandwyrm plating.

Sandwyrm_Throne.description: A seat fashioned from mandible plates and vertebrae. A grim trophy for contractors who enjoy a bit of dark comfort.
Sandwyrm_Throne.flavorText: Surprisingly good lumbar support for a predator\'s jaw.

Sandwyrm_Wing.description: A torn wing fragment which is suprising tough.
Sandwyrm_Wing.flavorText: Many have died trying to acquire these

Savory_Roll.description: A hearty pastry baked to perfection.
Savory_Roll.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Scale_Arms.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Chest.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Feet.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Head.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Legs.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scanner_Cave.description: A scanner that can locate caves within the surrounding area. Right click to toggle audible beeping.
Scanner_Cave.flavorText: Making life easier, one piece of technology at a time.

Scanner_DeepOre.description: A scanner that can locate various deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
Scanner_DeepOre.flavorText: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

Scoria.description: A rough-textured rock ejected from the earth during volcanic activity.
Scoria.flavorText: Also known in some areas as \'lava stone\'.

ScoriaBrick_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

ScoriaBrick_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

ScoriaBrick_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

ScoriaBrick_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

ScoriaBrick_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Scoria_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Scoria_Beam.description: A beam that provides rustic style and function.
Scoria_Beam.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Brick.description: A basic building block for all Scoria Brick building pieces.
Scoria_Brick.flavorText: A pyroclastic, highly vesicular, dark-colored type of volcanic rock that has been ejected from the ground in a molten form and then cooled.

Scoria_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Scoria_Brick_Beam.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Floor.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A fancy half-piece for your walls.

Scoria_Floor.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Frame.description: A sturdy frame to build with.
Scoria_Frame.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.

Scoria_Wall.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.
