Scorpion_Arms_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Arms_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Attachment_Armor.description: An attachment that grants a chance to return damage to the attacker.
Scorpion_Attachment_Armor.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, arms or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Scorpion_Boss_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_Boss_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Chair.description: A preserved Scorpion that\'s been skillfully molded into a chair.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Chair.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Hanging.description: A preserved Scorpion, that once lived on Icarus.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Hanging.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Tail.description: A preserved Scorpion tail from a fine specimen.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Tail.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Carapace.description: A remnant of a great beast.
Scorpion_Carapace.flavorText: A flake of light, but fairly strong armor.

Scorpion_Chest_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Chest_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Crossbow.description: An impressive crossbow crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_Crossbow.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

Scorpion_Feet_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Feet_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_FishingRod.description: An impressive fishing rod crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_FishingRod.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

Scorpion_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Scorpion.
Scorpion_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Scorpion_Head_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Head_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Hedgehog_Medium.description: A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure with poisonous stingers for extra damage.

Scorpion_Legs_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Legs_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of a deadly Scorpion tail.
Scorpion_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Scorpion_Module.description: A proportion of melee damage will be returned when hit.
Scorpion_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Giant Scorpion Creature.

Scorpion_Pincer.description: A pincer taken from the body of a slain Scorpion
Scorpion_Pincer.flavorText: Keep your fingers and toes clear at all times

Scorpion_Tail.description: A dangerous prize taken from a deadly foe

Scorpion_Trap_Medium.description: Similar to a bear trap, this is one device you do NOT want to stand on. Can be reset after activation.
Scorpion_Trap_Medium.flavorText: Be sure to give it a wide berth

Scorpion_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scrambled_Eggs.description: A portion of gently cooked whisked eggs spread on lightly toasted bread.
Scrambled_Eggs.flavorText: Now if only there was bacon...

Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Seed_Extractor.description: A simple tool which grinds up fruit and vegetables and extracts their seeds.

Seed_Fertilizer.description: Stimulates the Crop to Produce Seeds over Produce.

Seed_Harvester.description: An attachment for the Harvesting Cart enabling collection of seeds while harvesting

Seed_Oil.description: Thick oil, made from plant extract.

Seed_Pouch.description: A convenient 12 slot pouch for your seeds.
Seed_Pouch.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Seed_Pouch_T2.description: A convenient 24 slot satchel for seeds and fertilizer.
Seed_Pouch_T2.flavorText: Right click to access the Satchel Inventory

Shaped_Obsidian.description: Carefully carved, this material can hold a razor edge.
Shaped_Obsidian.flavorText: This material has been historically used for weapons, tools, ornaments and even mirrors.

Sheep_Head.description: A preserved memory of a wooly friend.
Sheep_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Shepherds_Roll.description: A savory pastry baked until golden.
Shepherds_Roll.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Shield_Bone.description: This gruesome shield is a formidable barrier that will strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.
Shield_Bone.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Carbon.description: A lightweight yet durable shield made from advanced carbon, providing excellent protection without weighing you down.
Shield_Carbon.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Composites.description: A versatile shield made from a blend of high-tech materials, providing adaptable protection against a variety of threats.
Shield_Composites.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Platinum.description: A premium-grade shield made of the finest materials, providing superior protection against the dangers of Icarus.
Shield_Platinum.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Steel.description: A sturdy shield made of durable steel, providing reliable protection against threats.
Shield_Steel.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Titanium.description: A heavy-duty shield made from ultra-strong titanium, providing excellent protection against threats.
Shield_Titanium.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shotgun.description: The reliable and timeless pump-action, savage at short range.

Shotgun_CHAC.description: A heavy hitting shotgun, built for creature suppression.
Shotgun_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Shotgun_Casing.description: An empty shotgun shell that can be used to create all types of shotgun ammo.
Shotgun_Casing.flavorText: An essential resource for a trusty firearm.

Shotgun_T4.description: An advanced weapon that packs a real punch.

Shovel.description: Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.
Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Shroud_Light.description: A handy shrouded light that gives off a cozy glow.

Sickle.description: An ancient, but efficient tool for harvesting from nature.
Sickle.flavorText: Delivers more resources with each swipe.

Sickle_Attachment_Harvest_Seeds.description: An attachment that allows the collection of Seeds directly from plants when harvesting.
Sickle_Attachment_Harvest_Seeds.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of plants from reaping.
Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of plants from reaping.
Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Silica.description: A key ingredient in concrete, glass and many other materials.
Silica.flavorText: The Silicon Age on Icarus is yet to arrive.

Single_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ClayYield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Clay from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ClayYield_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ClayYield_2.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Clay from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ClayYield_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ObsidianYield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Obsidian from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ObsidianYield_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ObsidianYield_2.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Obsidian from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ObsidianYield_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ScoriaYield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Scoria from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ScoriaYield_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_ScoriaYield_2.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Scoria from ore nodes.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_ScoriaYield_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid sledgehammer.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_Slow_1.description: An attachment that adds a chance to slow on attack.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_Slow_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Sledgehammer_Attachment_Slow_2.description: An attachment that adds a chance to slow on attack.
Sledgehammer_Attachment_Slow_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Slinker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great feline.
Slinker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Slinker_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Slinker.
Slinker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Attachment.description: An attachment that imbues your attacks with slowing effects and increases your resistance to slows.
Slug_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Slug_Axe.description: An Axe crafted from the spoils of victory against a Hammerhead.
Slug_Axe.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Slug_Grenade.description: A sticky grenade that will attach to whatever it lands on and then explode shortly after, leaving behind a pool of slime obtained from a Hammerhead slug.
Slug_Grenade.flavorText: A grenade crafted from the spoils of victory against a Hammerhead.

Slug_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Slug_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Slug_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Hammerhead Creature.

Slug_Skin.description: A piece of skin taken from the body of a great beast.

Slug_Slime.description: A glob of slime taken from the body of a great beast.

Slug_Trophy_Coil.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Coil.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Trophy_Habitat.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Habitat.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Trophy_Vial.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Vial.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Smashed_Avocado.description: A generous helping of smashed avocado spread on lightly toasted bread.
Smashed_Avocado.flavorText: Super popular on earth in the 2010s

Smoke_Grenade.description: A canister grenade, used for drawing attention or concealing.

Smoked_Bacon.description: Delightfully smoked bacon infused with honey.

Smoked_Fatty_Tbone.description: A large, fatty piece of smoked meat, with a punch of energy.
Smoked_Fatty_Tbone.flavorText: Guaranteed to perk up any prospector.

Smoked_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A savory snack made by smoking and preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish.
Smoked_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: UDA reports have mixed results on the flavor.

Smoked_Gamey_Meat.flavorText: Smokey and gamey, with a distinctive taste.

Smoked_Garlic.description: Garlic cured with smoke for a deep, earthy taste.

Smoked_Giant_Steak.description: A large steak, smoked and infused with a sweet watermelon flavor.

Smoked_Meat_Generic.flavorText: A simple recipe for a simple snack.

Smoked_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A flavorful snack made by smoking and preserving tender fillets of saltwater fish.
Smoked_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Fishy but with a hint of sweet taste.

Smoked_Soft_Meat.description: A piece of sweet smokey meat.
Smoked_Soft_Meat.flavorText: For when you want something sweet but it\'s dinner time.

Smoked_White_Meat.description: A piece of white meat jerky.
Smoked_White_Meat.flavorText: Cooked in soy, chewy but not too chewy.

Smoker_T3.description: A helpful device that can preserve food, using the power of smoke.
Smoker_T3.flavorText: The UDA advises you to use this item in a well-ventilated area.

Snare_Trap.description: A unique device that allows you to bait and capture select wild animals that can slowly be tamed. Craft Baits at the Ranching Station.

SnowLeopard_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Leopard.
SnowLeopard_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

SnowLeopard_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

SnowWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Wolf.
SnowWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

SnowWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Snow_Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a genetically spliced creature.
Snow_Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Mammoth_Trophy.description: A mounted genetically spliced Mammoth head.
Snow_Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Snow_Rabbit_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Rabbit.
Snow_Rabbit_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Slug_Head.description: A preserved memory of a genetically spliced creature.
Snow_Slug_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Slug_Trophy.description: A mounted genetically spliced Viscid head.
Snow_Slug_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Snow_Stalker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Stalker.
Snow_Stalker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Stalker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Soft_Meat_Cooked.description: A wonderfully soft piece of meat

Soft_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Solar_Backpack.description: While in sunny environments can charge any battery powered items contained within the inventory.

Solar_Panel.description: This solar panel needs to be in direct sunlight to create power, best deployed in a large, open area.
Solar_Panel.flavorText: As effective under this star as any other.

SonicDevice.description: A sonic device made based on the findings from the Research station.

Spawn_Blocker_T2.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its small radius. Requires Spoiled Meat to Function.
Spawn_Blocker_T2.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Spawn_Blocker_T3.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its large radius. Requires Biofuel.
Spawn_Blocker_T3.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Spawn_Blocker_T4.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its large radius. Requires electricity.
Spawn_Blocker_T4.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Speed_Fertilizer.description: Helps your crops to grow faster

Speeder_Kit.description: A mechanical vehicle which can be deployed to ride. Powered by Refined Oil.

Spider_Head.description: A preserved memory of a many legged creature.
Spider_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Spider_Silk.description: Strong silk produced by spiders created from their webbing.

Spider_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

SplineTool_Crude_Oil.description: A tool to help create and connect Crude Oil networks.

SplineTool_Electricity.description: A tool to help create and connect Electricity networks.

SplineTool_Fuel.description: A tool to help create and connect Biofuel networks.

SplineTool_Water.description: A tool to help create and connect Water networks.

Splint_Workshop_Bundle.description: A pack of Splints which heal broken legs and provides resistance to falling for a period.
Splint_Workshop_Bundle.flavorText: One of the latest Xigo products, for a better you.

Spoiled_Meat.description: Animal flesh, considerably past its best-by date.
Spoiled_Meat.flavorText: You wouldn\'t be the first prospector desperate enough to eat this.

Spoiled_Plants.description: This produce is certainly past its best
Spoiled_Plants.flavorText: I wouldn\'t eat that if I were you

Sponge.description: A useful herbal ingredient, and holds a small amount of water.

Squash.flavorText: A myriad of squash varieties exist, but the effects of genetic tampering by xeno-biologiest have resulted in a variant with noticeable endurance-enhancing qualities.

Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a large amount of stamina and boosting maximum stamina and stamina regen for a short time.
Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: Like the energy drinks of old, sometimes you need a little pick me up.

Stationeers_Bobblehead.description: A cute trophy showing off your love for Stationeers.
Stationeers_Bobblehead.flavorText: Not sure how you got the UDA to agree to delivering this...

Steel_Arrow.description: A stronger arrow head, more durable than flint.
Steel_Arrow.flavorText: Tempered and fletched, the steel arrow has significant upsides over comparable alternatives.

Steel_Axe.description: A steel axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
Steel_Axe.flavorText: Steel of this quality would be an embarrassment to any industry on Earth, but on Icarus remains a minor miracle.

Steel_Bloom.description: A precursor mixture of iron ore and coal, smelted in a concrete furnace to create steel.
Steel_Bloom.flavorText: The conditions on Icarus give its would-be metallurgists very little control over the finer details of steel smelting. A basic bloomery process prevails.

Steel_Bolt.description: A hard-hitting steel bolt, trading distance for damage.
Steel_Bolt.flavorText: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.

Steel_Hammer.description: The most efficient tool for repairing damaged structures.
Steel_Hammer.flavorText: The tidal forces of Minos produce exceptionally violent weather on Icarus, its largest moon, which in turn damages even the most robust construction. A steel hammer can even the odds ... a little.

Steel_Ingot.description: A medium-density ingot of carbon steel.
Steel_Ingot.flavorText: Stronger than iron, more elastic than rubber. Sometimes.

Steel_Knife.flavorText: Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.

Steel_Pickaxe.description: Tempered steel, suitable for even the toughest of metals.
Steel_Pickaxe.flavorText: When first landing on Icarus prospectors quickly discovered the need for stronger metals to deal with the local ore.

Steel_Rebar.description: Heavy, ribbed steel wire for reinforcing concrete.

Steel_Spear.description: A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.
Steel_Spear.flavorText: The word \'spear\' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.

Steel_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.

Steel_Throwing_Spear.description: A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.
Steel_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The word \'spear\' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.

Stick.description: Small branches, easily fashioned into basic tools.
Stick.flavorText: Whether making weapons or tools, a crafting bench or fuel, basic creation begins with the humble stick.

Stomper_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Stomper_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stomper_Matriarch_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Stomper_Matriarch_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stomper_Matriarch_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Stomper Matriarch.
Stomper_Matriarch_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Stomper_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Stomper.
Stomper_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Stone.description: Chunks of sedimentary rock, easily worked.
Stone.flavorText: The geomorphology of Icarus has some similarities to Earth, but in many regards remains a mystery.

StoneBrick_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

StoneBrick_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

StoneBrick_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

StoneBrick_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

StoneBrick_Fireplace.description: A classically built fireplace. Built for longevity, can be used to cook and heat.
StoneBrick_Fireplace.flavorText: Still used on earth to this day.

StoneBrick_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents the smoke so it doesn\'t fill your room.

StoneBrick_Fireplace_Ext.description: An Extension for the Stone Brick Fireplace.

StoneBrick_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

StoneBrick_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Stone_Advanced_Beam_Set.description: An advanced set of beams for use with diagonal and curved pieces.

Stone_Arrow.description: The most basic version of an ancient weapon.
Stone_Arrow.flavorText: Attempts to redesign the planet failed, but the terrazone nonetheless has a ready supply of raw ingredients for this \'rock on a stick\'.

Stone_Axe.description: A roughly-made axe, but fells trees well enough.
Stone_Axe.flavorText: The first step on a path that leads back to the 22nd century.

Stone_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for much higher building.
Stone_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height further.

Stone_Brick.description: A solid and reliable stone brick, for building strong structures.

Stone_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Stone_Brick_Beam.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Floor.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A homely half-piece for your walls.
Stone_Brick_Halfpiece.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Stone_Brick_Ramp.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Roof_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Stone_Brick_Wall.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Cairn.description: A pile of stones, which can mark a significant location for a prospector.
Stone_Cairn.flavorText: What significance does this place hold?

Stone_Curved_Set.description: A set of cross-tile curved pieces.

Stone_Diagonal_Curved_Wall_Angles.description: A set of cross-tile curved walls in various angles.

Stone_Diagonal_Set.description: A set of cross-tile diagonal pieces.

Stone_Floor.description: Roughly hewn flagstones, unlikely to burn.

Stone_Frame.description: A heavy stone foundation, extends height and stability of constructions.

Stone_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Stone_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Stone_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Stone_Knife.description: A basic hunting tool, strong and sharp enough ... just.
Stone_Knife.flavorText: Icarus\'s unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.

Stone_Pickaxe.flavorText: The soft sedimentary rock scattered across Icarus\'s surface is easily shaped into useful tools. They may not be durable, but can be repaired easily enough.

Stone_Ramp.description: A sturdy stone ramp or roof to resist the elements.

Stone_Roof_Corner.description: A robust insert for angled roofs.

Stone_Roof_CurvedAngles.description: A set of curved roof pieces to place over or under curved wall angles.

Stone_Shovel.description: Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.
Stone_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Stone_Sign_Small.description: A stone sign to display information.

Stone_Throwing_Knife.description: A basic, balanced blade for taking down foes at medium distances.
Stone_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Icarus\'s unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.

Stone_Wall.description: Build stronger structures, unthreatened by fire.

Stone_Wall_Curved.description: Curved versions of the wall angles, for use underneath curved roofs.

Stonejaw_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Stonejaw.
Stonejaw_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stonejaw_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Storca_Head.description: A preserved memory of a cute creature.
Storca_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Storca_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Strawberries_And_Cream.description: Fresh Cream and Strawberries existing in perfect harmony.

Strawberry.description: A sweet and juicy fruit with a bright red color.
Strawberry.flavorText: The average berry contains around 200 tiny seeds

Strawberry_Candy.description: A small candy perfect for quick bursts of energy.
Strawberry_Candy.flavorText: What could go wrong with a small sugary treat?

Strawberry_Jam.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Strength_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Provides a large boost to melee damage, throwing speed and physical resistance, for a short time.
Strength_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: For when you want to get up close and personal.

Stringy_Meat.description: Stringy meat, typically found in fast, predatory creatures

Stringy_Meat_Cooked.flavorText: Get your revenge on those pesky wolves

Stringy_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Stryder_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Stryder.
Stryder_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stryder_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Stuffed_Avocado.description: This avocado has been halved and filled with a savory mixture.
Stuffed_Avocado.flavorText: Another great meal from your Cooking Station.

Submachine_Gun.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents.

Submachine_Gun_Sandwyrm.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents.

Submachine_Gun_Scout.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents. Specially desidned for the Eden Scouts.

Sugar.description: A handful of sweet sugar cubes.

Sugar_Cane.description: A piece of raw sugar cane, ready for processing.

Sulfur.description: A common, flammable ingredient for torches and gunpowder.
Sulfur.flavorText: The tenth most common element in the universe, sulfur is essential for life, but also death, through its many different modes of incineration.

SulfurWorm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a giant sulfur worm.
SulfurWorm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

SulfurWorm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Super_Cooled_Ice.description: A volatile substance that can cause frostbite in seconds.

SurveyTransmitter_NoSnap.description: A wideband, surface-to-orbit communication laser relay system.
SurveyTransmitter_NoSnap.flavorText: Inaris\'s laser uplink transmitter was originally commissioned by Uniao for off-world mining communications. The federation reputedly owns a majority share in the manufacturing company itself.

Survival_Backpack.description: A backpack geared to help you survive in the wilderness
Survival_Backpack.flavorText: Provides a quick and easy way to carry more items, with reduced fall damage

Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a large amount of food, water and oxygen, and reducing their consumption for a short time.
Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: Perfect for the prospector on the go.

Suture_Kit.description: A basic medical kit for healing deep wounds.
Suture_Kit.flavorText: Whether lightly or deeply wounded, \'Permit the pain to pass over you, and through you.\' - Bao Li Wei

Swamp_Viscid_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Viscid.
Swamp_Viscid_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Synthetic_Armor_Arms.description: A synthetic bio-loop system tuned for regenerative performance in hostile environments.
Synthetic_Armor_Arms.flavorText: Your second skin - smarter than the first.

Synthetic_Armor_Chest.description: A synthetic bio-loop system tuned for regenerative performance in hostile environments.
Synthetic_Armor_Chest.flavorText: Your second skin - smarter than the first.

Synthetic_Armor_Feet.description: A synthetic bio-loop system tuned for regenerative performance in hostile environments.
Synthetic_Armor_Feet.flavorText: Your second skin - smarter than the first.

Synthetic_Armor_Head.description: A synthetic bio-loop system tuned for regenerative performance in hostile environments.
Synthetic_Armor_Head.flavorText: Your second skin - smarter than the first.

Synthetic_Armor_Legs.description: A synthetic bio-loop system tuned for regenerative performance in hostile environments.
Synthetic_Armor_Legs.flavorText: Your second skin - smarter than the first.

Synthetic_Enzymes.description: Synthetic Enzymes used in the Terraforming Process in Icarus.
Synthetic_Enzymes.flavorText: The Catalyst used in the Terraforming Process

Synthetics.description: Engineered flexible materials for use in fabrics and insulation.

T3_Backpack.description: A durable cured leather backpack that increases inventory space, carry weight capacity and reduces the weight of ore and wood.

T3_Cleaning_Device.description: Cleans Volatile Exotics and processes select boss material into biomass for use in the orbital Biolab.
T3_Cleaning_Device.flavorText: Keep all hands and feet clear when in use.

Tackle_Box.description: A place to store your Fishing Lures and latest catch.

Target_Bullseye.description: Can be used to test out Ranged Damage Per Second.
Target_Bullseye.flavorText: A Bullseye made out of locally sourced materials.

Target_Dummy.description: Can be used to test out Damage Per Second.
Target_Dummy.flavorText: If only real bears would stay this still.

Taxidermy_Knife.description: A small, strong precision cutting tool.
Taxidermy_Knife.flavorText: Perfect for precise cuts to preserve that \'still breathing\' look.

Tech_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to assist your creative endeavours.

Teenage_Caveworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Teenage Caveworm.
Teenage_Caveworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Teenage_Caveworm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Tequila.description: A strong distilled spirit with a fiery kick.

Terraforming_Dust.description: Remnants of the terraforming process brimming with ions for catalysation.
Terraforming_Dust.flavorText: Such a rich, dangerous blue shade.

Terrenus_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Terrenus.
Terrenus_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Terrenus_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Tesla_Coil.description: A sturdy tower which will thrust lightning at nearby enemies.

Thatch_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Thatch_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Thatch_Floor.description: A lightweight, quickly crafted floor piece.
Thatch_Floor.flavorText: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, if not particularly durable protection.

Thatch_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two-part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Thatch_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Thatch_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Thatch_Railing_Gate.description: Light, easily crafted railings with a gate.

Thatch_Ramp.description: A light, easily crafted ramp for roofing or access.
Thatch_Ramp.flavorText: Whether you employ this for a roof, or simply for ease of access, the thatch ramp is simple to make and easy to carry, but provides only limited environmental protection.

Thatch_Roof_Corner.description: A lightweight insert for angled roofs.

Thatch_TrapDoor.flavorText: Attaches to a thatch floor trapdoor.

Thatch_Wall.description: Lightweight walls, doorways and windows (Hold \'R\' for variants).
Thatch_Wall.flavorText: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, disposable protection.

Thermos.description: Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection

Thermos_Cocoa.description: A savory chocolate drink that slows hunger, and warms.
Thermos_Cocoa.flavorText: In the absence of sugar, Icarus\'s cocoa drinks return to a classical, savory \'Spanish\' style.

Thermos_Coffee.flavorText: If it didn\'t shield you from the leaden weight of fatigue, it wouldn\'t be coffee.

Thermos_GreenTea.description: A nourishing, warming drink that soothes the spirit.
Thermos_GreenTea.flavorText: Arguably humanity\'s single greatest contribution to the galaxy.

Thermos_IceWater.description: Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection

Thermos_WildTea.description: A slightly bitter, warming beverage that reduces thirst.

Thumper.description: Deploy and activate to unearth mineable ore. Replenishes mineable ore in the surrounding area.
Thumper.flavorText: Sure hope this doesn\'t attract anything big...

Thumper_Deep.description: Reconfigures deep ore deposits in the surrounding area into different mineable resources. Deploy and Activate to Trigger.
Thumper_Deep.flavorText: Sure hope this doesn\'t attract anything big...

Thumper_Mini.description: A compact version of the Thumper designed to draw out creatures living underground.
Thumper_Mini.flavorText: Designed for finding underground caves, turns out it also disturbs everything living in them.

Thumper_Sandworm.description: A compact version of the Thumper designed to draw out creatures living underground.
Thumper_Sandworm.flavorText: Designed for finding underground caves, turns out it also disturbs everything living in them.

Titanium_Arrow.flavorText: Whether on Icarus or Earth, hunters continue to value skills for stealth, control and intimacy of the kill.

Titanium_Axe.description: A savagely sharp, extremely durable hand axe.

Titanium_Bolt.flavorText: "When you\'ve got two tons of polar bear lumbering towards you across the ice, you suddenly realise a bullet\'s not going to cut it. But a titanium bolt through the eye, that\'s another story." - Sol Berlinski

Titanium_Crossbow.description: A powerful weapon to help you tackle whatever Icarus throws at you.
Titanium_Crossbow.flavorText: Classier than a gun, more exciting than a bow.

Titanium_Hammer.description: A durable and reliable tool for structure repair.
Titanium_Hammer.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Titanium_Ingot.flavorText: Once thought to be forged by sad-eyed lemurs in the underground kingdom of Booyaka-Woot, this was conclusively disproved in the early 22nd century.

Titanium_Knife.description: A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.
Titanium_Knife.flavorText: Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.

Titanium_Ore.description: High purity ore, strong and extremely durable

Titanium_Pickaxe.description: An extremely strong, lightweight mining tool.

Titanium_Plate.description: A small plate of titanium which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery.

Titanium_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides moderate storm resistance to your crops.
Titanium_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Titanium_Sickle.description: A resilient version of an antique design.
Titanium_Sickle.flavorText: Sharper and stronger, it swings further, delivering more resources with each swipe.

Titanium_Spear.flavorText: Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.

Titanium_Throwing_Knife.description: A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.
Titanium_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.

Titanium_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.

Tomato.description: A staple in many diets that can be eaten raw or cooked.
Tomato.flavorText: Classed as a fruit, not a vegetable.

Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_1.description: An attachment that increases your attack speed.
Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your attack speed.
Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Bleed.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Bleed on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Bleed.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Durability_1.description: An attachment that decreases durability loss for tools.
Tool_Attachment_Durability_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Durability_2.description: An attachment that decreases durability loss for tools.
Tool_Attachment_Durability_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Electroshock.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Electroshock on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Electroshock.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_1.description: An attachment that increases your melee damage.
Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your melee damage.
Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Poison.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Poison on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Poison.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_StaminaCost_1.description: An attachment that decreases stamina loss for tool usage.
Tool_Attachment_StaminaCost_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_StaminaCost_2.description: An attachment that decreases stamina loss for tool usage.
Tool_Attachment_StaminaCost_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid tool at an Alteration Bench.

Trail_Beacon.description: A beacon to assist you in creating a breadcrumb trail to find your way back out of uncharted territory.

Tree_Sap.description: A natural adhesive used in concrete and epoxy.
Tree_Sap.flavorText: Whether you subscribe to the cohesion-tension or multiforce theories of sap transport, osmotic pressure gradients or axial potentials, it makes no difference to how useful it is.

TriangulationBeacon.description: A short range detection device used for triangulating biosignatures.
TriangulationBeacon.flavorText: Tracks the biggest source of provided materials.

Trophy_Bench.flavorText: Make a record of your victories, because planet is barely aware of you.

Truffle.description: A rare fungus prized for its strong aroma and flavour.
Truffle.flavorText: A delicacy worth more than its weight in gold.

Truffle_Focaccia.description: A soft, savoury bread laced with truffle flavour.
Truffle_Focaccia.flavorText: A bread that elevates survival into art.

Truffle_Fries.description: Crispy golden fries drizzled with earthy truffle flavour.

Truffle_Pasta.description: Rich pasta enhanced with the depth of truffle.
Truffle_Pasta.flavorText: A dish that tastes like victory itself.

Truffle_Vodka.description: Vodka infused with earthy truffle essence.
Truffle_Vodka.flavorText: The forest and the fire, bottled together.

Tundra_Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a kind deer.
Tundra_Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Tundra_Deer_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Drosik.
Tundra_Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Tundra_Monkey_Head.description: A preserved memory of a Gribbler.
Tundra_Monkey_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Tundra_Monkey_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Turret_Flamethrower.description: A modified turret which fires a steady stream of flame at nearby enemies.

Turret_Pistol.description: A turret that uses pistol ammunition to defend its surroundings. Fires a steady shots at a medium range. Power consumption reduced when idle.
Turret_Pistol.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Tusker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Tusker.
Tusker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Tusker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ubis_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ubis.
Ubis_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ubis_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Uranium_Arrow.description: An arrow crafted from inert uranium metal.

Uranium_Bolt.description: A bolt crafted from inert uranium metal.

Uranium_Converter.description: A high-speed centrifuge engineered to refine fissile material with maximum efficiency.

Uranium_Generator.description: A compact reactor unit engineered to provide massive, continuous power in remote operations.

Uranium_Inert.description: Uranium Metal that can be moulded to be used in for crafting.

Uranium_Raw.description: Raw Radioactive Uranium, will cause radiation poisoning if not stored correctly. Can be processed to convert into Inert and Rod Form.

Uranium_Rod.description: Refined Radioactive Uranium, will cause radiation poisoning if not stored correctly. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Uranium_Rod.flavorText: Deadly, but worth a pretty penny.

Vapour_Condenser.description: Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to condense vapor into exotics or condensed enzymes. WARNING: Attracts creatures while active.
Vapour_Condenser.flavorText: Pretty high tech, considering it was created on planet.

Vegetable_Roll.description: An easy choice packed with veges.
Vegetable_Roll.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Venom_Sac.description: A venom sac taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Viscid_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Vitamins.description: Provides resistance to many of the afflictions on Icarus.
Vitamins.flavorText: One a day keeps the doctor away.

Vodka.description: A clear spirit that packs a sharp, clean bite.

Volatile_Substance.description: A highly explosive substance made from locally found materials native to Icarus.
Volatile_Substance.flavorText: This feels like it could explode at any point.

Volatile_Substance_Inert.description: Formally highly explosive substance made from locally found materials native to Icarus.

WaterBomb.description: A thrown device for fire fighting.
WaterBomb.flavorText: Woven from fiber, the water bomb allows fire suppression from a safe distance.

Water_Barrel.description: A classic wooden barrel used to store water.
Water_Barrel.flavorText: A tried and trusted method used for generations.

Water_Borer.description: Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to collect & filter water from subterranean deposits.

Water_Pump.description: A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.

Water_Purifier_T1_Ground.description: A simple water purifier that collects and purifies rainwater.

Water_Purifier_T1_Water.description: A simple water purifier that can be placed into a body of water to create filtered water.

Water_Purifier_T2.description: A water purifier that can be connected to a water network to filter water and make it safe for human consumption.

Water_Purifier_T4.description: A water purifier that can refill bottles for you automatically.

Water_Sprinkler.flavorText: Must be connected to a water source.

Water_Trough.description: A simple, fillable trough to provide water for tamed creatures. Use a water container to fill, or let nature do its thing when it rains.

Water_Trough_Fountain.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.
Water_Trough_Fountain.flavorText: Who says creatures can\'t drink with style?

Water_Trough_Large.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.
Water_Trough_Large.flavorText: Like the smaller one, only larger

Water_Trough_Metal.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.

Water_Trough_Stone.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.
Water_Trough_Stone.flavorText: Every good animal farm has one of these.

Water_Trough_T4.description: When powered incoming water is filtered fresh for your animals to drink.
Water_Trough_T4.flavorText: Do the animals drink better than prospectors?

Watering_Can.description: When used will water any crop plots or dirt mounds in a small area in front of you.
Watering_Can.flavorText: It\'s better to be a Prospector in a garden, than a Gardener in space.

Watermelon.flavorText: Icarus produces approximately 0.003% of humanity\'s watermelons.

Watermelon_Lollypop.description: A watermelon flavoured lollypop, perfect for quick bursts of energy.
Watermelon_Lollypop.flavorText: Watermelon is not for everyone, but it is what we\'ve got.

Waterskin.flavorText: The waterskin\'s rough construction allows for rapid crafting, perfect for basic survival needs.

Wheat.description: Process into flour using the mortar and pestle.
Wheat.flavorText: An essential ingredient to basic foods and drinks. Whether baking bread or brewing beer, wheat is where it all begins.

White_Jelly_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted from White Jelly, to attract more fish.
White_Jelly_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

White_Meat.description: A small cut of white meat

White_Meat_Cooked.description: A slightly overcooked piece of meat

White_Meat_Dried.description: A plain piece of dried meat

WildBoar_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Wild Boar.
WildBoar_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

WildTea.description: Gorse flowers, can be turned into a warming drink.
WildTea.flavorText: Whether invited or not, gorse followed humanity to Icarus.

Wild_Boar_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Wind_Turbine.description: A rudimentary wind turbine that will generate electricity for your work.
Wind_Turbine.flavorText: As if the UDA ever cared about being \'environmentally friendly\'...

Windmill.description: A mill using mechanical power from wind to grind various items found on Icarus.
Windmill.flavorText: A tried and true method, used for 100s of years.

Wine.flavorText: You\'re four billion kilometers from Earth, but some things never change. Wine stops the pain, increases stamina and health regen.

Wolf_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of a rather unfortunate Wolf.
Wolf_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Wood.description: Roughly cut wooden timber, ready for the crafting bench.
Wood.flavorText: Adapted by terraformers to life on Icarus, Earth-origin trees flourish, and appear to grow more swiftly, possibly due to exotic matter.

Wood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Wood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Wood_Bow.description: A primitive bow with limited range and durability.
Wood_Bow.flavorText: A more rudimentary bow is hard to imagine, but will prove lethal in steady, patient hands.

Wood_Burner.description: For keeping you warm in cold environments and basic cooking.

Wood_Chair.flavorText: Driven by the demands and scarcity of life on the surface, a recognizable \'Icarus vernacular\' has swiftly emerged, spanning many forms of design, with furniture being no exception.

Wood_Crate_Medium.description: Store, share and protect items and resources.

Wood_Crate_Small.description: A modest wooden crate for storing small items.

Wood_Cupboard_Small.description: A modest wooden cupboard for storing small items.

Wood_Door.flavorText: Doors can be attached to doorways, once built.

Wood_Door_Refined.description: A light wooden door, best suited to internal use.
Wood_Door_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Flare.description: A longer burning source of light in the darkness.
Wood_Flare.flavorText: \'One thing about wearing a helmet, you don\'t notice your shack smells like Satan\'s armpit.\' ~ Sol Berlinski. (Activate with secondary attack.)

Wood_Floor.description: Rugged timber flooring, stronger if supported by beams.
Wood_Floor.flavorText: Durable if rudimentary flooring, prone to damage by Icarus\'s heavier weather. Notably prone to fire in lightning storms. Wooden structures can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Wood_Floor_Refined.description: Light wooden flooring, best used internally.
Wood_Floor_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Floor_Refined_Curved.description: Light wooden flooring, best used internally.
Wood_Floor_Refined_Curved.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Wood_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Wood_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Wood_Hedgehog_Medium.description: A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure.
Wood_Hedgehog_Medium.flavorText: Hedgehogs may have been left on Earth but the lessons they tought will serve us well on Icarus.

Wood_Ladder.description: A rudimentary ladder, lashed together with fiber.

Wood_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of wood, to attract more fish.
Wood_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Wood_Rag_Torch.description: An easily crafted source of illumination.
Wood_Rag_Torch.flavorText: An ancient guiding light has found its place on Icarus, to keep the darkness at bay.

Wood_Railing.description: A rough, but serviceable wooden railing.

Wood_Railing_Gate.description: A rough, but serviceable wooden railing with a gate.

Wood_Railing_Gate_Refined_V2.description: A light wooden railing for internal construction, with a gate for easy access.

Wood_Railing_Refined.description: A light wooden railing for internal construction.

Wood_Ramp.description: A basic wooden ramp or roof.
Wood_Ramp.flavorText: A ramp or a roof, depending whose hands this element is in. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Wood_Ramp_Refined.description: A light ramp, best used internally.
Wood_Ramp_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Refined.description: Processed, high quality timber for construction.

Wood_Roof_Corner.description: A roughly cut insert for angled roofs.

Wood_Spear.description: Simple to make, easy to break.
Wood_Spear.flavorText: An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.

Wood_Table.description: A wooden table, like so many before it.
Wood_Table.flavorText: It\'s possible that the entirety of human culture can be extrapolated from the existence of tables.

Wood_Throwing_Spear.description: Simple to make, easy to break.
Wood_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.

Wood_TrapDoor.flavorText: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure.

Wood_TrapDoor_Refined.flavorText: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure. Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Wall.description: A roughly made wall, window or doorway (Hold \'R\' for variants).
Wood_Wall.flavorText: Wood structures withstand light storms without damage. Can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Wood_Wall_Angle.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Wood_Wall_Refined.description: A light wooden wall, best used internally.
Wood_Wall_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Window.description: Open to let Icarus in, close to keep it out.

Wooden_Shield.description: A rudimentary shield that can be used to block incoming attacks.

Wool.description: Raw wool shorn from a sheep or collected from its corpse.

Wooly_Zebra_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Shaggy Zebra.
Wooly_Zebra_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Wooly_Zebra_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Workshop_Beehive_Starter_Kit.description: A basic kit which allows the starting up of a beehive, including Queen Bees, Bees and Honeycomb.

Workshop_Calf.description: A Calf preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Calf_Male.description: A Calf preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A1.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A2.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A3.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_B.displayName: Cryogenically Frozen Himalayan Seal Point Cat
Workshop_Cat_B.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_C.displayName: Cryogenically Frozen Tortoise Shell Ragdoll Cat
Workshop_Cat_C.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Chick_Female.description: A Chick preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Chick_Male.description: A Chick preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cooker.description: A convenient cooking solution for a prospector on the go.

Workshop_Dog_A1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_A2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_B1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_B2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_C1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_C2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_D1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.
Workshop_Dog_D1.flavorText: It is Laika - Back from space - what a good dog.

Workshop_Dog_D2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.
Workshop_Dog_D2.flavorText: It is Laika - Back from space - what a good dog.

Workshop_Dog_E.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dressing_Bundle.description: Provides the best healing Xigo can offer, treating most wounds, poisons\', bacterial and parasitic infections instantly. Consume for a pack of 5 Xigo Quick-Fix Kits
Workshop_Dressing_Bundle.flavorText: One of the latest Xigo products, for a better you.

Workshop_Heater.description: A convenient heating solution for a prospector on the go.

Workshop_Horse_A1.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Horse_A2.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Horse_A3.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Hydrazine_Container.description: A canister to power your applicable MXC equipment.
Workshop_Hydrazine_Container.flavorText: A rare gas that once floated amongst the stars... now cooking your dinner.

Workshop_Lamb_Female.description: A Lamb preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Lamb_Male.description: A Lamb preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Piglet_Female.description: A Piglet preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Piglet_Male.description: A Piglet preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Purification_Tablet.description: Will convert any Water into Treated Water. Removes any flavour effects. \r\n\r\nTo use, Craft the \'Cool Water\' recipe on your character with this tablet and a non-pure water source in your inventory.

Workshop_Sawblade_Bundle.description: A Stack of 20 Sawblades for the Timber Extraction Unit. \'CONSUME\' to open box.
Workshop_Sawblade_Bundle.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Workshop_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides heavy storm resistance to your crops and causes them not to wither after they are fully grown.
Workshop_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Yeast.description: A sugary herb, rich in natural yeasts. Add to a cooking
Yeast.flavorText: Technically a fungus, yeast is a unicellular microbe of the genus Saccharomyces, seemingly unaffected by Icarus\'s toxic atmosphere. Add to mortar and pestle with flour and water from a container to make dough.

Yeast_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from yeast, to attract more fish.
Yeast_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Yeti_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Yeti_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Yeti_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Yield_Fertilizer.description: Increases the yield of your crops
Yield_Fertilizer.flavorText: Fertilizer is a multivitamin for your plants

Zebra_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Zebra.
Zebra_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Zebra_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Kit_Concrete_Furnace.description: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
Kit_Concrete_Furnace.flavorText: Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

Kit_Electric_Furnace.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.
Kit_Electric_Furnace.flavorText: Does a helmet count as safety goggles?

Cooking_Station.description: A food preparation and butchering bench.
Cooking_Station.flavorText: While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.

Light_Worklamp_Directional.description: A basic lamp for illuminating a large area.

FirePit.description: A large, stone-lined pit for swift cooking and heating.
FirePit.flavorText: Flashroast a steak or an entire mammoth forequarter.

Glassworking_Bench.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Faction_Mission_Drill.description: A portable, heavy duty boring rig powered by biofuel.
Faction_Mission_Drill.flavorText: Driven by bio-diesel, this micro-derrick design was adapted from asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

Electric_Dehumidifier.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

WaterWheel_Generator.description: A combined wheel and generator, turns fluid motion into angular momentum.
WaterWheel_Generator.flavorText: Still one of humanity\'s greatest ideas.

Basic_Wall_Light.description: A wall-mounted lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.

Faction_Mission_WallDrill.description: An industrial-grade, portable electric mining rig designed for horizontal aperture drilling.
Faction_Mission_WallDrill.flavorText: This micro-derrick rig was adapted from Inaris-designed asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

Faction_MIssion_Analyzer.description: Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.
Faction_MIssion_Analyzer.flavorText: An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.

Mission_Analyzer_Egg.description: Scans and locates nearby organic matter of the same type.
Mission_Analyzer_Egg.flavorText: Another machine designed by a scientist who has never stepped foot on Icarus.

Filletting_Station.description: A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.

Anvil_Bench_T4.description: An impressive foundry powered by electricity for crafting various higher quality weapons and tools.
Anvil_Bench_T4.flavorText: The UDA states that it has been at least seven days since the last accident using this piece of equipment...

Single_Wall_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Wall_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Wall_Light_Foggy.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Mission_Generator_NoDestroy.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Mission_Generator_NoDestroy.flavorText: Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

Enemy_Turret_Pistol.description: A turret that fires on anyone not registered to the system, fires pistol ammo.
Enemy_Turret_Pistol.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Hub.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Prop_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A mortar and pestle used for grinding up elements.

Mission_TPS_Communication_Tower.description: Intercepting Communication Signals within the Area

Enemy_Turret_Flamethrower.description: A modified turret which fires a steady stream of flame at nearby enemies.
Enemy_Turret_Flamethrower.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Eden_NPC_Hunter.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Creatures within the area. Will buy Vestiges.

Eden_NPC_Norex.description: A Norex representative who deals in the trading of Biomass. Buys creature parts.
Eden_NPC_Norex.flavorText: Why was it programmed with such an attitude?!

Eden_NPC_Farmer.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Plants growable on Icarus. Will buy Crops.

Eden_NPC_Fisher.description: UDA assigned Specialist who deals in all manner of Aquatic Life on Icarus. Will buy Fish.

Eden_NPC_Chef.description: The Food shop of the Culinary Specialist.
